subject: Without Florida, we’ll lose the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida

there's absolutely no denying it
| | |

Friend, I don’t know if you heard, but [Sen. Joe Manchin has officially announced that he will not seek reelection in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74471866/441689948/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTczZjExOWItNmY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q73YLjVLK-ESYOgzhGhuXVoIBMnKK0-ilhqYpgQTbEM=)
**Now that Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip West Virginia red, we absolutely need Florida to defend our Senate majority. Plain and simple.**

Listen, there's absolutely no denying it — the path to defending the Senate runs right through Florida.
**[**We've got to step up to the plate: I need to raise $50,000 before my midnight deadline, and I need your help to hit it. Will you please rush $5 or more right now to make sure that we can flip Florida and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74471867/441689949/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTczZjExOWItNmY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q73YLjVLK-ESYOgzhGhuXVoIBMnKK0-ilhqYpgQTbEM=)**

This changes everything, friend. Without a Democratic incumbent running, we have _almost no chance_ of holding West Virginia. **Donald Trump won the state by almost 40 points. ** **Florida is a different story.** Experts are already calling this one of the most competitive races in the nation — and last time, Rick Scott only won his seat by 0.12%!
**The path to the Senate runs DIRECTLY through Florida. I know it, you know it, Rick Scott knows it, and Mitch McConnell knows it.** That means Rick Scott won’t be alone with his millions in this — the GOP will be spending _ more than ever _to keep this seat red and defeat my campaign.
This race is a statistical tie right now. But if we're outspent over these next few weeks, Rick Scott _will_ retake the lead — _and we may never catch back up._
**[This race in Florida is Democrats' BEST chance to save our Senate majority — and I'm counting on your help to win. Will you rush $5 right now to flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority? We HAVE to win this race, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74471872/441689954/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTczZjExOWItNmY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q73YLjVLK-ESYOgzhGhuXVoIBMnKK0-ilhqYpgQTbEM=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

clean_body: If you are unable to see the message below, . | | | | | | | . | | | | | | | | | . | | | | | | | | Real quick, Friend- Santos is officially out. Congress (rightfully) expelled him, leaving New York’s 3rd Congressional District now open. There will be a special election to fill this seat, and the Dems are already scheming to win a quick pickup – just one of the five seats they need to flip to take back the House. I've been named an early GOP favorite, so I need to win this newly urgent fight. My top priority is doing what's right, so Republicans can keep this seat in November. New Yorkers need a trusted GOP voice fighting for them on issues like crime, immigration, affordability, the war in Israel, and much more. As a retired NYPD detective, a small business owner, and a leader in my local community, I am ready to serve in Congress on “Day One,” but I am counting on your support to get me there: | | | | | THANK YOU! Mike Sapraicone Republican for Congress P.S. The liberals can rake in millions from their lobbyist buddies at the drop of a hat, so is key if I’m going to beat the Left in the upcoming special election. Santos is gone, so let’s get to work! | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Mike Sapraicone for CongressPO Box 222Greenvale, NY 11548 | | | | |

body:
| | | Fellow American,

Right now American is torn between two futures. _We have the hate-filled, antisemitic, socialist dictatorship that Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and AOC want..._ ... **or we have a future of prosperity under Republican leadership that will NEVER take our freedom for granted.** Fellow American, I never thought I’d see sitting members of Congress want to destroy America from the inside out, but that’s exactly what the socialist squad is trying to do. Fellow American,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you're satisfied with the job we're doing._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e745fd2286e41238c7a0cd26699651e&_e=-_jnNlzvoHuFVF3a5fH_xWohddxYzOH6QmFfBpesaCo58R1XxUWa3KiMG92jJ4g79TzrxqQ8HpzI_PwgPBH6fWSVQ1KVIggmhXPNiv-1Lw8Z6f1CDwCzXahND724HmGREXpE3u0tUwIijsCJTGL2wlabz2hge4VsD8x3WnxB_zRfkoAhMemSG9_dE8WnNbOP2HplD2jWFdgPDIGT9y_m8xrKBB91Mz5rvS117k3yzr1voEqBnXaHjaScWxFhEguWvcU4IC6qphPn30EbmQTry5OQDkbHcJiF2wfQWgrWun40Hcau-Y0KFclOWtLPfAAonXw929td1HZq5Kyy_yca1gVgFheFfnIjmKSiDr1lSU6ScbIBto6Zo8wAHYoqFX5x15dTNCjGEWkAjZ-1WU3yGg%3D%3D)

_**-Grade the Republican Majority-**_ [** Fill Out Report Card Now **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e745fd2286e41238c7a0cd26699651e&_e=-_jnNlzvoHuFVF3a5fH_xWohddxYzOH6QmFfBpesaCo58R1XxUWa3KiMG92jJ4g79TzrxqQ8HpzI_PwgPBH6fWSVQ1KVIggmhXPNiv-1Lw8Z6f1CDwCzXahND724HmGREXpE3u0tUwIijsCJTGL2wlabz2hge4VsD8x3WnxB_zRfkoAhMemSG9_dE8WnNbOP2HplD2jWFdgPDIGT9y_m8xrKBB91Mz5rvS117k3yzr1voEqBnXaHjaScWxFhEguWhaskdqahxdDZcZc9OWafyqe-h3lY8uur5ldNGpICuLDcWkhsRrM-NtFIbNtAwpx7DN7Di1-bwaR3FIbHocwxmDfx73FRQcSF1lStxEFS008wuviwEY_mRlFKxd_F9Y79qRxKFdrjddDMv9-opRWRXg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Almost one year into the Majority, we’re curious to know how you think we’re doing. | | Fellow American, Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority. We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration." The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority. The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American. From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption. Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. -Grade the Republican Majority- Thank you, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: they’re coming for you, Pro-Life Friend
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-y/)

That’s a recent headline from _NBC News_ , cheerleading for more new deaths across the country. . .

You’ve probably seen similar ones over the last few days about pro-abortion radicals pushing for abortion referendums _(like the one recently passed in Ohio)_ in nine more states in 2024.

And they’re doing it by spreading LIES that this is what the American people want, knowing that their pals in the press will never tell the truth about how devastating abortion really is.

Even as I write to you, they’re circulating petitions in Nebraska, South Dakota, Missouri, Florida, Nevada, Arizona, and Colorado asking voters to sign them to put legalized late-term abortion on the ballot in 2024.

**In fact, in Ohio, we found that the Abortion Lobby was paying flown-in activists from California $20 per signature they were able to gather!**

Pro-Life Friend, the best _(and cheapest)_ way to DEFEAT these pro-abortion referendums is to make sure they never get to the ballot by getting on the ground fighting in January!

**That’s why _Students for Life Action_ is working to mobilize and educate voters to DECLINE TO SIGN pro-abortion petitions in their home states where they’re being proposed!**

Can you take two quick actions to help make sure this program is a success by:

**1)** REFUSING to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure by taking your **[“I DECLINE TO SIGN” PLEDGE](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-j/)?**
**2)** **[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or at least $25 right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-i/)?**
With your generosity, we’re preparing to kick off massive campaigns across all of these states in January, utilizing the presence of local pro-lifers to help us WIN!

The fact is, if we’re going to stop these referendums, we need to start now – _not after they make it to the ballot!_

Preborn human lives should not be subject to unclear referendum language that is typically written in a way to trick voters into voting “YES.”

Simply insisting that people **“DECLINE TO SIGN”** any ballot measure can make an enormous impact in these referendum fights.

First, it puts people on red alert about what the Abortion Lobby is doing. . .

To gather signatures, pro-abortion activists often lie about what the ballot measures they support would do – saying it’s for “healthcare freedom” – just like they do when these referendums are being voted on.

Sadly, it’s been incredibly effective so far.

**In Ohio, one GOP pollster told me that ONE-QUARTER of the people who voted to legalize late-term abortion were actually pro-life!**

We cannot allow confusion to rule the day any longer.

_Lives are on the line_!

That’s why we have to double down on our efforts to tell young people the TRUTH about abortion.

That’s why your support is so important – and why I’m counting on you to:

**1)** REFUSE to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure by taking your **[“I DECLINE TO SIGN” PLEDGE](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-d/)?**
**2)** **[Agree to your most generous contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, or at least $25 right away?**
**By donating, you’re helping me purchase activism materials that can be used by any grassroots activist where pro-abortion petitions are being pushed!**

Your support means the world to us!

We couldn’t do any of the critical mind-changing and life-saving work we do on campuses, and in communities across the nation, without the prayers and support from grassroots pro-lifers like you!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – The Abortion Lobby believes they can trick voters into signing on to efforts to put legalized late-term abortion on the ballot.

That’s why your support to _Students for Life Action_ is crucial as we fight them on the front lines.

So, will you please sign your **[“I DECLINE TO SIGN” PLEDGE](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-k/)** noting that you will personally REFUSE to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure?

**[And then would you consider making your most generous contribution to keep _Students for Life Action’s_ programs going into 2024](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sthittl-duchtdja-u/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sthittl-026154D2-duchtdja-o) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-sthittl-duchtdja-b/)
**

**
---

And they’re doing it by spreading LIES that this is what the American people want, knowing that their pals in the press will never tell the truth about how devastating abortion really is. Even as I write to you, they’re circulating petitions in Nebraska, South Dakota, Missouri, Florida, Nevada, Arizona, and Colorado asking voters to sign them to put legalized late-term abortion on the ballot in 2024. In fact, in Ohio, we found that the Abortion Lobby was paying flown-in activists from California $20 per signature they were able to gather! Pro-Life Friend, the best (and cheapest) way to DEFEAT these pro-abortion referendums is to make sure they never get to the ballot by getting on the ground fighting in January! That’s why Students for Life Action is working to mobilize and educate voters to DECLINE TO SIGN pro-abortion petitions in their home states where they’re being proposed! Can you take two quick actions to help make sure this program is a success by: 1) REFUSING to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure by taking your ? 2) ? With your generosity, we’re preparing to kick off massive campaigns across all of these states in January, utilizing the presence of local pro-lifers to help us WIN! The fact is, if we’re going to stop these referendums, we need to start now – not after they make it to the ballot! Preborn human lives should not be subject to unclear referendum language that is typically written in a way to trick voters into voting “YES.” Simply insisting that people “DECLINE TO SIGN” any ballot measure can make an enormous impact in these referendum fights. First, it puts people on red alert about what the Abortion Lobby is doing. . . To gather signatures, pro-abortion activists often lie about what the ballot measures they support would do – saying it’s for “healthcare freedom” – just like they do when these referendums are being voted on. Sadly, it’s been incredibly effective so far. In Ohio, one GOP pollster told me that ONE-QUARTER of the people who voted to legalize late-term abortion were actually pro-life! We cannot allow confusion to rule the day any longer. Lives are on the line! That’s why we have to double down on our efforts to tell young people the TRUTH about abortion. That’s why your support is so important – and why I’m counting on you to: 1) REFUSE to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure by taking your ? 2) noting that you will personally REFUSE to authorize any pro-abortion ballot measure? ? Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge’s conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36394%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kniQF%2bR3jJWvSQGG1I2eMg&sysid=1)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjcofo4m8ieqqvb8a16odud8ah3diu2dj6lg7m38_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg68oj3cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zamhe0uuo9723ep4q9k24ee9rqtq1f2dagumbgko_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg68oj3cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7t7ea0drqtkjncfnqs0tnmdrh04gpjie8l85r7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg68oj3cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjn7uras6175til5kscbsqatnrskla71c7r1o8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg68oj3cjh2bs)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zru3ahr77k1rqs5lpej0pfhbn7021h0lkv6ntiug_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob3clh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsg0uvsfjtt1safetlnv1um5lgv1ff1c0v6mpnmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob3clh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8370fnm5n3c06891uhtb7lebpa7v7g10df6mge0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob3clh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvpa0jqefa090fodlej44rmlbtbiljk577u5698_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob3clh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

GOP Presidential
---

name: American Update
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XQw2wnjE7%2fL71kvFx5XnvQ&sysid=1) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tF%2fv1H5t7qjKwjYfFVBb9Q&sysid=1)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685473%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=12nkXp2276Lnph7n3C%2bxXw&sysid=1)**

body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5lluvt4b5bq9ce56qtv3se9oojfj94cee7jj6t0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob7c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfc8433t3aa7d5sshjdfh2iaatmgfn8rn0h0lti0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdg61ob7c5h2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol. | | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters. To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol. The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens. In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life. You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of A Christmas Carol today. Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations. Best regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m done watching Republicans lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW_olAyiNb

I will never stop standing up for what I know is right-even when
it goes against the grain of public opinion.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_olAyiNb

Friend,

The
time for chirping from the sidelines is over.

Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple:
2024 is the time to put up or shut up.

As
a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you
serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida,
and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership
nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to
show the nation that leadership.

I
debate and defend what I KNOW is right-even when it goes against
the grain of the approved elite media narrative.

The
American people deserve a President with a track record of taking
action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our
leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe
Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and
Kamala Harris has done nothing at all.

I
am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If
Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time
we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the
playbook for defeating the woke mob:

Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT
and pornographic content for young kids

STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force
taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to
breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down
the country

I
promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans
will forget this culture of losing once and for all. This is a
race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I
am asking for your continued support. If you can, will you pitch
in $25 today?

PITCH IN
$25

PITCH IN
$47

PITCH IN
$75

PITCH IN
$100

PITCH IN
$150

PITCH IN
$200

The
time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback
takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And
freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN.

I
am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we
will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the
Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from
kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in
schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Stand with me on the debate stage: Donate
HERE

Our
Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to
fight for it.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW_olAyiNb

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.
clean_body: I will never stop standing up for what I know is right-even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. Friend, The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to show the nation that leadership. I debate and defend what I KNOW is right-even when it goes against the grain of the approved elite media narrative. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob: Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country I promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. This is a race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I am asking for your continued support. If you can, will you pitch in $25 today? PITCH IN $25 PITCH IN $47 PITCH IN $75 PITCH IN $100 PITCH IN $150 PITCH IN $200 The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now. 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. Stand with me on the debate stage: Donate HERE Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it. In Freedom, Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfkh1fa4sr3bf5184cl4danh0gh2p3al3dqq9qvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64ob5chh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbo2co4vfd6bata0c95jufqfamf68a116e57a7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64ob5chh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq1iimvb5ci1r58qi925uhpdc0fmdln02rmfrong_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64ob5chh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ilpdp7pv71p1fnhel7hoq9hjdl5q2pl85p1muo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64ob5chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Action News
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ejofkl8cuut6mur3hooclgqqt32ku1n6vosolo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64o34cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znokpn00lcaodm8tgvfa8lg1imrr6gk8ivhdqk0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi64o34cjh2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

American Action News

body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4EizXud9ZcfBPlC86pPjlA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTuxsP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLUFGUi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla3lObGWZ11JXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4EizXud9ZcfBPlC86pPjlA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTuxsP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLUFGUi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla3lObGWZ11JXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4EizXud9ZcfBPlC86pPjlA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTuxsP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLUFGUi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla3lObGWZ11JXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36318%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZZLvOOKGb%2f70Vgcc2ykzng&sysid=1 "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here’s how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36319%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iNuM9FsmnA%2f7Mioz4eC%2bBA&sysid=1 "Donate")

Here’s why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I’ve been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36310%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=29H7MHHkYiSsreAYABj9Hg&sysid=1)

[Donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36311%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ZF9x%2bjDcYvdqwcYiTJbXQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the “Lawfare” used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It’s time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36312%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JgOWwNfYIGD5gMdMeLSF0g&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36313%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jPDz6pogRdqLkXmMhtVN3w&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36314%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s4i9t4iN8GXzmbPzGyh9ew&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36325%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sEi%2fHtzQFV%2bCqsB5qkUHsg&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36326%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JKDhPQdfvv9QbiVCHzIKSg&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36327%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XfkFuGQ8qHdYvTAR0TvCrg&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36328%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gdp8Xm5lmIdOEETLnJFsEw&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36329%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EWvaNjx45saL1VbmbRNtbQ&sysid=1)

Thank you for your continued support!

We will take our country back.

Thank you,

Kash Patel

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgn71g0e80rfilj1nvmeijp1supbo1ggioq8eu9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi6aor1cph2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37o83spmd5lr1vfv1n0ffuj95vuqlmsljj7i07o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi6aor1cph2bs)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4k4lcqsgm2pbn3f80nlal0uca3d87htdv3ounvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi6aor1cph2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9vgchse0kjhjb911uc1s5rlpb4d4kqj10dq14q8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi6aor1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c1ge6o71c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmc9fo8sapus3hinua9i8kn82kjvrqu31m9qdbpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cdi6aor1cph2bs)_

With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness. | | | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory today. Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year: -- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior. -- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit. -- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes. -- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together. And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the Proclaim the Gospel $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: . With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional , a great Christmas gift for anyone! I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that. I'm very thankful for your friendship with Pathway to Victory. God bless you, Dr. Robert Jeffress American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Conservatives Give
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2f11ba88fd548ebb97dc7821afdf409&_e=EQWkuBqjDV86EbJ_9VuMmDKYZYpjtXPqSMuJUqLdzoCJkfZTxmUk3T6ATaOycX6ch63_EVoYwG9JW-UdNwRyDUHRdQ42fC3cKv5tdx7tGjKtzthzaowIMzsZVT3ueooUctd73WQgjkJTkcK-lsIP8retvGNtT0UX2nxdySmKbaTdwdy2vaLZ3WaAKLhX_qa3VK-E7JeD5aBOdnKfJSORvyhtqDdR38c_a7okQq7VCelHM1B1a0iLhhZd0eI0-I36hbOxd4X-LoX_HjRkf1rzPJi1ZvMj4Y9Nlo6_N2povQ7rpl_IMxRFGSIu2_RdfY0-hXwxFuSFYIBmUD4AP4K-0bvMU3tWgDKMGbfixG9PRGKg8_jKlrcw-XOsJzIm0zMj3g3MPVtbD6itxkxxFxzu_g%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2f11ba88fd548ebb97dc7821afdf409&_e=EQWkuBqjDV86EbJ_9VuMmDKYZYpjtXPqSMuJUqLdzoCJkfZTxmUk3T6ATaOycX6ch63_EVoYwG9JW-UdNwRyDUHRdQ42fC3cKv5tdx7tGjKtzthzaowIMzsZVT3ueooUctd73WQgjkJTkcK-lsIP8retvGNtT0UX2nxdySmKbaTdwdy2vaLZ3WaAKLhX_qa3VK-E7JeD5aBOdnKfJSORvyhtqDdR38c_a7okQq7VCelHM1B1a0iLhhZd0eI0-I36uKUx1sLBnTm2t3tWXCt45PMSTbQolO6KjUY6sMat158Epsn9WPCexIB0Ml_XYl7rCSq8oxBJ7Q9rvO8cmnIEGNcpLXcjk9vvy_04k1gE2PJSgjPzDIxFgBSCsteYj0JrisceJ4X7p61bMnK842uV-A%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZhOQhQhIODGRi4YWO7r4LQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTvr0P0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla8JcbGW0F1XAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZhOQhQhIODGRi4YWO7r4LQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTvr0P0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla8JcbGW0F1XAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZhOQhQhIODGRi4YWO7r4LQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTvr0P0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla8JcbGW0F1XAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZhOQhQhIODGRi4YWO7r4LQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTvr0P0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla8JcbGW0F1XAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

US Conservative Network

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop dirty mining
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170228?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Friend,** If this bill were law in the 1900s, the **Grand Canyon National Park wouldn’t exist as it does today.** I’m referring to the Mining Regulatory and Clarity Act, which is _**the largest mining industry handout**_ since 1872. Here’s just how bad this law would be: Our precious public lands would be open for _**ANYONE**_ to purchase absolute rights to occupy the land forever. They could build roads and pipelines through culturally and environmentally significant lands and waters. The bill even gives people the right to _**bury our public lands under tons of toxic waste.**_ Our outdated mining laws offer no environmental or community protection. Reforms are needed, but this bill would only make matters worse -- and it might pass unless environmentalists like YOU help us stop it! **[Please, Friend, send a message to your Congressmembers: say NO to mining industry handouts and reform our outdated mining laws to protect people and public lands!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Missing*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This bill could be used to **BLOCK clean energy projects** \-- meaning the mining and fossil fuel industries would have another weapon to fight renewable energy. Someone who wants to stop a solar or wind project could file a claim to land in the path of the green project and be given an absolute right to stop it from moving forward.
Instead of protecting our public lands, there would be an increase in hardrock mining – which consistently releases more toxic chemicals than any other industry. According to the EPA, **40% of Western headwaters are polluted by mining.** People drink from water that could be contaminated with mining pollution. This bill would only make it worse. **[Tell Congress to OPPOSE the Mining Regulatory and Clarity Act and support environmentally-safe mining laws!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

subject: AI Energy Could Unleash a $40 Trillion Wave of Wealth
body:
Revealing details on a new form of energy

| | Dear Reader, Technology expert, Ian King, just released a groundbreaking interview. Revealing details on a new form of energy (called "AI Energy") that's expected to create a $40 trillion wave of wealth in the next decade. But what's most exciting is he's uncovered an innovative firm with a device powering this breakthrough ... and he's found a way to tap into this company -- and its massive patent pipeline -- starting with as little as $5.

Of course, no investment is guaranteed, but the sheer potential of this situation for fast-acting investors is undeniable ... and worth a few minutes of your time to see it for yourself.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take.
