Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=53cfce2ad9c889206f9025d066e2e699313e3f30554e29e610079e84595757f4e86a7678526d894db54af7589e3e6e698932a60af6543102d19bfd9432f87c8f

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour. | | | | | Friend, Hamas's terrorist attack on Israel was the greatest atrocity since the Holocaust, and it has never been more important that we stand shoulder to shoulder with our greatest ally. October 7th was Israel's 9/11, but they were not alone in their losses. Amongst the innocents massacred by Hamas were 32 Americans - and these terrorists are still holding Israelis and Americans hostage. "Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies." | | Hamas could not have gone forward with their attack without the approval of Iran, the largest state sponsor of global terrorism. Since Biden took office, he's perpetuated the Obama era policy of appeasing Iran, which has emboldened our enemies. As a result, Israelis and Americans have been slaughtered and taken hostage, and antisemitism is skyrocketing at home. Anti-Israel, pro-Hamas extremism has risen to such a level that it's even gone unchecked in the halls of Congress. Yet Biden has done nothing. As our greatest ally faces an existential threat, it's never been more important that our leaders: Rescue every American hostage Provide Israel the full support they need Stop appeasing Iran Put an end to antisemitism in the United States "If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today." | | The Republican Jewish Coalition is the leading Republican organization devoted to supporting Israel, fighting antisemitism, and electing strong leaders who align with our shared mission. Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour. "So please, take action today." Sincerely, | Kevin McCarthy | | | America 's greatest ally needs YOU. As Americans, we lived through the horrors of 9/11 and during that trying time, our Israeli friends stood shoulder to shoulder with us in our war on terror. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b9781585867403f8541268e0902001a&_e=jD6RiQDf50Nqnz_MtPIEpz902CG374SZlBoJU0ld-t3mKXnbZeCxCSdduwsCfcXsQjX6QFzvGaaRHfrf61VMZ8wY0klvlq6TUyEgX3gsgTECJz_MLsgzAJrjqk91u2I4fC2EAoiCyR_TRmmZ_teF1IrYJ_JjkS13bbORudejaviaAoKBaXkUqwYnj0AnOQzRyiIp4MEBnErSAFrY1gdajg70atOEYcc_CJ19dx-f5QTA5a3b-K8_XjRpFmD5hZkUweCI5BGlpnEdfa5YyKDv3ir5Dtv0N8oDKQeDsXkk-WM%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b9781585867403f8541268e0902001a&_e=jD6RiQDf50Nqnz_MtPIEpz902CG374SZlBoJU0ld-t3mKXnbZeCxCSdduwsCfcXsQjX6QFzvGaaRHfrf61VMZ8wY0klvlq6TUyEgX3gsgTECJz_MLsgzAJrjqk91u2I4fC2EAoiCyR_TRmmZ_teF1OgmVdp_7meRzhkuYiJ0fQj7tU-_tnxghAX8RPPlPMsmGIUmkfb0712t8rh4gcw4DaOOySS4FewO8ZF2P2KDAzBggjqZ4Hkt5opS56QORTM3md8Kkq5o1dncP8FZgvaaYfpLorWPGoAUFU13gAE0gjU%3D)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b9781585867403f8541268e0902001a&_e=jD6RiQDf50Nqnz_MtPIEpz902CG374SZlBoJU0ld-t3mKXnbZeCxCSdduwsCfcXsQjX6QFzvGaaRHfrf61VMZ8wY0klvlq6TUyEgX3gsgTECJz_MLsgzAJrjqk91u2I4fC2EAoiCyR_TRmmZ_teF1Imjc5P8BrHl8jLFj6NmKhBlT8P3JZ52nNKOgkx-Y4Ri2BYkxnf6yDWrFmeU76Qia0TAk3mortrbCrQZhoiD-xprScbLtujqiuamJ1BgePP9utWQq0f-afO5o6OUCV2nx9CghtjlCwb2PhBPzkoWhR4%3D)**

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Zx5J_ZTzPcQFAkOX9YI3LA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTxYGP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9wcmVyZWcvY2hyaXN0bWFzLWNhcm9sP3NjPTAxMDkyTjAyNDJMMjFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNjYXJvbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BX1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla9pqbGXkJa-yUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Zx5J_ZTzPcQFAkOX9YI3LA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTxYGP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9wcmVyZWcvY2hyaXN0bWFzLWNhcm9sP3NjPTAxMDkyTjAyNDJMMjFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNjYXJvbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BX1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgpla9pqbGXkJa-yUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Restore Our Nation
---

| Fellow legislators and I have been submitting legislation to make life better for Virginians. The third bill I submitted for the upcoming General Assembly session is the Voter ID Act to restore faith in our elections. 80% of Americans polled support voter ID. What do you think?
Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what I have been up to:

| Today is the Last Day for Bethlehem Walk Goochland

| Today 3pm to 8pm is the last day to attend Bethlehem Walk in Goochland County. Since its inaugural season in 2003, each December, Salem Baptist Church partners with various churches to reach thousands of people with this interactive Gospel drama that takes visitors through scenes ranging from the entrance of the Savior into the world to an empty Jewish tomb. [Learn more here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wsq92c7ozF-efXohjfOUlmESGrVyR5ZWydCtcMBZ3GsfOmG6L4wmCcIrj-qQAnK8g5wiM4Vs44xZWjft9qglfqTpHCnkCfPBo7QNcv8TJtc645EuhSudj3JHNvzSdexFLN-5EQ7L2HYy2WJJfr6Db8RJRdB9RryV&c=Tz1aDAD_XiCSIciVtmF22qO08HGabRekdpG7LDlfbTB-jnegWtXnhg==&ch=p9XMpgLpm24HSFzvnIhEzjdDatGUDxxicbB8CFFlxLY90ST7mhksDg==)

| Trump 2024!
---
|
---
| Vote Trump! We do not have a country without a secure border. We the people are less safe at the local, state, and federal level because of dangerous anti-American Biden policies. The enemy is not at the gate, the enemy is through the gate. Our military must be merit based (remove CRT), have the best equipment, and the best training.
Under Biden we have:
-Open Borders -Violent Crime Way Up -Weak Military -Runaway National Debt -Cultural Warfare -Mass Inflation -Terrible Economy -Unaffordable Housing -Global Conflict
The one man strong enough to fix it and Save America is Donald J Trump. Please make a plan to vote. We have 45 days of early voting, the first day to vote is January 19, 2024. body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92183a9cc5e94ba6862afefa506f1bfc&_e=8X8mBMUW_0_vXVLlKjebw3W4sakQkxBt_F3yD9nSJJWl3w3XVKCpzbSFMfHMwSlvnNPNCNWSxEGmXz3mM1tRZwO0ys9GT4g0g1bEuumecscbHQf54qNiiNmqHfuAyNdh7QkgpnN6fA78vkFZLG6Q7yhWtNQ6o8G9kzQT7gQ3Lu-_tgGOA0T9Iv2ufOwQRfRyEHmUZVIh2zRdF8vVTdSMccKUhFuUKgU_DH9-fRyFt2Cdqc_2mKLlV4xCN1n_LyUAFqE_WhtCvWEHscR8_MA64oaVkm-aXEVxrpvrB6QcpMpuT0z2PYJKMsWEc2cdsyD6IYkiK_E93f8dj2H4KHgq4ijW6seoxoXLbwEjskJ4NAg%3D)

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92183a9cc5e94ba6862afefa506f1bfc&_e=8X8mBMUW_0_vXVLlKjebw3W4sakQkxBt_F3yD9nSJJWl3w3XVKCpzbSFMfHMwSlvnNPNCNWSxEGmXz3mM1tRZwO0ys9GT4g0g1bEuumecscbHQf54qNiiNmqHfuAyNdh7QkgpnN6fA78vkFZLG6Q7yhWtNQ6o8G9kzQT7gQ3Lu-_tgGOA0T9Iv2ufOwQRfRyEHmUZVIh2zRdF8vVTdSMcfApibx8IThF4e8e1ItMl7twEvNkEgK5im0SRVK3hug9fLD9AXNQrmUZeq5X6ooOpE6UA5NG8zyxlQWo97VFsaS-X3dRH-IpOsOpEVf1MwPBtHq3SQwI8-IH7vRAUGnnya1R1MRDWDKkjrY4kSffyrg%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92183a9cc5e94ba6862afefa506f1bfc&_e=8X8mBMUW_0_vXVLlKjebw3W4sakQkxBt_F3yD9nSJJWl3w3XVKCpzbSFMfHMwSlvnNPNCNWSxEGmXz3mM1tRZwO0ys9GT4g0g1bEuumecscbHQf54qNiiNmqHfuAyNdh7QkgpnN6fA78vkFZLG6Q7yhWtNQ6o8G9kzQT7gQ3Lu-_tgGOA0T9Iv2ufOwQRfRyEHmUZVIh2zRdF8vVTdSMcamcUJwxghaMe-IJ8pBCIVnKvF-9AwFggzQs2U8hwpEpPDZeJ0YhVTXrO1mWa-yWn8MgBXnpM6U1bBNx6EJgCAOT4iB6EuJ8nJdnJjEhismrEeppT6NaiT1ySyhhoJWYlLaKKzKg8I7kn5oMomAF-xs%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92183a9cc5e94ba6862afefa506f1bfc&_e=8X8mBMUW_0_vXVLlKjebw3W4sakQkxBt_F3yD9nSJJWl3w3XVKCpzbSFMfHMwSlvnNPNCNWSxEGmXz3mM1tRZwO0ys9GT4g0g1bEuumecscbHQf54qNiiNmqHfuAyNdh7QkgpnN6fA78vkFZLG6Q7yhWtNQ6o8G9kzQT7gQ3Lu-_tgGOA0T9Iv2ufOwQRfRyEHmUZVIh2zRdF8vVTdSMcaVY5utEN9HUQhs6VCf062jQbxUSzTmxQexk66m09UpoNwO629ZdMZVs7PY-XNCv4ffsdnyeggDF-Oi-5cxdFSi_qXqj6ez-iyMyZqeQx2QcJFhjgaBumyD_l_aGyxdWqp3NSkbKI3y58BhcHN39mLI%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Freedom Nation Today

Friend,

You may have heard my name in the news a lot lately. That's why I wanted to reach out and make sure you heard my story directly from me.

**[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help boost my campaign's momentum!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a17e3ed7a90644f09f200830f05281c0&_e=NiAJ8dx7HYVH-qp3WjS1Y_hmHpuf9kXmY4oEYFClA1qrsy6orCvil86F8getrVceUk706Pt_IUJEokUWsQsvt0C1n9ojKt1vESfr0OoHyCl2P2yXFDdtAsMqBBskJcgLT6H_Tdzp1pl6PstOVJS7byQl59UAZ5GVVKI-wjiQtrVuH7j6kSZ_A6vBYihHBP_ML-YPS0mrwexxixME1bItynYB39FyG1dLWLszrOJK01JJvJSjesZQ_WWI9hhsETxXjvrcOWAhXQMzp4AkVmqT-ysHvMnU1zcUnjSq0jUG7WpJx2eJHYv_QAL4NR9nH43v4S3VS8Fc76txIwuM2Uzswm6Zb4fuwaT8Ae97kJjyo3JjWhGq0YJhb7qn5zzDxKSkojMIqzyBFAsXF_aVIgNUga9M0mz3DoDQ86_pUVnGcJatgJeSUM8Lh5f9paCOFU38_enmCvH-UbzCTf9c0GcnI2cqd-8ZU3ZfvtD8WSNpVzC9Mb1i10vSEHzuv2lJNsugx-4J804_2an0rXHi0KOSdwhnycBbcN4vpBV5H7kiu5v4Y4o9KeSeOaZsHtVTl3XEnBCCLTJVlzRBtTbAc1piOipoRP8i5YkDw1_JwX35hKDXglNSDvKl1Bq_fc5cMLYV_Jkxy13WMFiJUoSr-1Tn-Hb1FS7nnL7xGUzMWPdgCVY%3D "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help boost my campaign’s momentum!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a17e3ed7a90644f09f200830f05281c0&_e=NiAJ8dx7HYVH-qp3WjS1Y_hmHpuf9kXmY4oEYFClA1qrsy6orCvil86F8getrVceUk706Pt_IUJEokUWsQsvt0C1n9ojKt1vESfr0OoHyCl2P2yXFDdtAsMqBBskJcgLT6H_Tdzp1pl6PstOVJS7byQl59UAZ5GVVKI-wjiQtrVuH7j6kSZ_A6vBYihHBP_ML-YPS0mrwexxixME1bItynYB39FyG1dLWLszrOJK01JJvJSjesZQ_WWI9hhsETxXjvrcOWAhXQMzp4AkVmqT-ysHvMnU1zcUnjSq0jUG7WpJx2eJHYv_QAL4NR9nH43v4S3VS8Fc76txIwuM2Uzswm6Zb4fuwaT8Ae97kJjyo3JjWhGq0YJhb7qn5zzDxKSkojMIqzyBFAsXF_aVIgNUga9M0mz3DoDQ86_pUVnGcJatgJeSUM8Lh5f9paCOFU38_enmCvH-UbzCTf9c0GcnI2cqd-8ZU3ZfvtD8WSNpVzC9Mb1i10vSEHzuv2lJNsugj1pTVnDC8wmnub9P7U0VTTUVoh-Ed-qIj5YyLk3hHOI1py5BrO-Lwed9L5pD76sLUqFh8AxWVh6aM93mScK1PCZKxZwBZSP2VRpgjntQq7lw4UKyb3MruiGgiBMlHe34X6pgbKKhNNEmUzPFTN3OvsYnE1irySXbAsqjIiPw520%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a17e3ed7a90644f09f200830f05281c0&_e=NiAJ8dx7HYVH-qp3WjS1Y_hmHpuf9kXmY4oEYFClA1qrsy6orCvil86F8getrVce6vdBS_OJMEa16qmrpGMSSzazhz_WHYzlHomTWpOAosbHzxVRnJJRar7MQ58zaBuzTNL9T_B_D5z5ATqBJRiaycfRxGwonX14w1H6Myz4Fv1OLLpvd-9m79BibxO0uvXaIDNI7273LHhh4w9l1IrRxyeo2xNY4LmlDzKk_BIgUeW1BpOLmcKTBRo8W8-JRZ5f5mwJ3UQZXlLlcOFdcfma2JfkJ99u2d_EaErDCenCSrBAZXJa60sCpswMCAQykpeVM6N32oFvILkABch_I1qMMiCjDV7aM8LJ1NUU6O2_Y2bee5z4m6wLzjwvxk3ZUAAduqxjpd3pShfIAtNJ2yf-2uPKumDW2tsG3BgE0lPKohBhi9PVOYx_Q-eBIZ84utJ72dBIWlqzqdsJYjzI-HoDqeOcpRyM5zYY4R4-_GfsGmNKLw2x--B03hA0pddanJCttTy9fJZzDrqbwVNEnV7TFDokLTqhYE9YgRWx8ZxYLBja2kci9wLJ_YWsNwNJtcoK9X6PaWby6CLdEn0I1W9j9CPp4l4PglEBAGoBwA-opzbV7__h7oTjzSFUv4gkLGMDf5pyA3RmWgiRwCWZ4Zif_g%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: My name is Nikki Haley. | | | | | | Friend, You may have heard my name in the news a lot lately. That's why I wanted to reach out and make sure you heard my story directly from me. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help boost my campaign’s momentum!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for president because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, at this very moment in time, my campaign momentum is stronger than ever. "But with less than 2 MONTHS until the first votes take place, we can’t take our foot off the gas for one second." It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help fuel my campaign, amplify my message across America, host more events than ever before, and keep our momentum surging until we gain the confidence of EVERY voter. Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a key role in the outcome of my race and the outcome of our future. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today and to support my presidential campaign? " | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7637183314084a35a4945720acaa7350&_e=s8LMslRYJsTM1hZ3HCrymrgrJ6wxpn85yyT5PBBE2tIw6ShLyzGgK_P0MaxBtjt1D8HP47hqXYFOnvpsO6Be-_UhaJ529it1tlImUY_1mNuHRV2EMt3PHM4anJgF3mqosBJ0vbm10f6h-oOJc2_L1sBVTUBLp-fi5j7nblsbnH8hvcJkgv9yEh6VJdrLsaCNlZCES9GSEJcsceJYSykBKoiJmCE0dWuZJ4psoGwJj2L5usbTLonRb4lqCWXz5QBiLExYWlRgvTq0em4L2YiDUB1RgOHT_vcBtIKo0FHv7A2FJbi_tFlyKLlTUTwQgLxmxewQWVX581Qpi91EIDenXpR46safUbeFDZaQENEbKnNpLLNY5sEMRjhxPG-oTC3JBV2341V_ICmhc5CqjrMkWg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7637183314084a35a4945720acaa7350&_e=s8LMslRYJsTM1hZ3HCrymrgrJ6wxpn85yyT5PBBE2tIw6ShLyzGgK_P0MaxBtjt1D8HP47hqXYFOnvpsO6Be-_UhaJ529it1tlImUY_1mNuHRV2EMt3PHM4anJgF3mqosBJ0vbm10f6h-oOJc2_L1sBVTUBLp-fi5j7nblsbnH8hvcJkgv9yEh6VJdrLsaCNlZCES9GSEJcsceJYSykBKoiJmCE0dWuZJ4psoGwJj2L5usbTLonRb4lqCWXz5QBibYI6RL6KOKX-5KbGOD5TAgLdZIV2Bs_Zo4i9qWVFcggRWp5fUFCl9JkKEOSbKCHsfARKnzwG2vf1Y_B9jTad_NZHq2cbArMna0IVRyYQ0clLzrpafCI3sTgV41mSvM9L9p1Yf1l94umUZydUD9impQ%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da5f91bdb3ba48d191deb06eb3ddd838&_e=4-AqkTxEDIMNUMK7mFah8qEMcjMv9fMU400zp8H6jVsbjpJt0bIUPrTaboZJgr73z9iP5ZO1fCqiM-20dEyiwwFhV684g_xqBi24liK12X8yFFiUzQJ4tYnuDwftpQXGcEW748cWx73FMWRjKHMsWDvZpv9ACkU6jsnDgjEnC1SIBZg5O9fJmj93qaTp5H346fdusPhmWaIDCbn2-gDUnRbkRwGvH9ZcNqK_EHuUDRYw4s5blRDMmuDhHJg0nk8x26fJkG-2UwuJF-FbztrOw1Ul4_pUc1MyrNmAFpe3W6TdYubQSjKCLnKliU4fvqNSEB85hmkVA3hUxXpPEEPROMygcKhQaemeES3cfVc2eVjFTyP7SYAtRn3Zn9Vc34BaWac1jGYimgIdPgsM7E7CWA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da5f91bdb3ba48d191deb06eb3ddd838&_e=4-AqkTxEDIMNUMK7mFah8qEMcjMv9fMU400zp8H6jVsbjpJt0bIUPrTaboZJgr73z9iP5ZO1fCqiM-20dEyiwwFhV684g_xqBi24liK12X8yFFiUzQJ4tYnuDwftpQXGcEW748cWx73FMWRjKHMsWDvZpv9ACkU6jsnDgjEnC1SIBZg5O9fJmj93qaTp5H346fdusPhmWaIDCbn2-gDUnRbkRwGvH9ZcNqK_EHuUDRYw4s5blRDMmuDhHJg0nk8xYX5DnnSNj6n1gZ-ZYWTUNi3TNeF_igoyS-03sq6qwjO-DsXo57JJX-xr2PscpH66ryEPBzIX5e-QFijUG3mxw7AJ17MyHd9EWV8OgOWtw4ydT3coZHVU30NEx1AbuU73R3G1CTxdAcy3LzXa90IksQ%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

After all the action we've seen in the House this year,_we really want to touch base_ and gather some candid responses from top supporters.

Gathering honest opinions from patriots like you is pivotal for staying on top of things in the coming year. It would be great to see your name on the response list so I can read your thoughts!

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ed0e24495b7640338423de9cc5c80023&_e=iVK43q0vGn_ISIB4EyY2SHF6r_MiU_DdVrxB4jtPCq0ImQ5egJ8avCrcadwDjp_BY8wgzA3vZrS1sfDfeIEK-Nba7jYVBiDhbPy57M30B1opRH7yK3tMn7k888RBgVjOqXui8A6E-R_PtYd_oBLjAGB8o3cwlcFmiLH-6aRCTCUwaS1QsjZWCx9JsFLEmSmslirA6J9zhIvrh8PoRY0pPUrwIbuh0vaYVPx-6QkP6d-WL3SdW_9ViVDPbL4iuf_CF6Eb3O0ahgm-XnjbHjB3W0XTOg0ae6WoVnQHzZspI1Z2ot8mZoMALaL3kvvoAsMn5T3QAW9ctdaN4vRWuP6S1_w5fa1s9z3z7pvrKBINJkLe6HT5q1yvfmTBV4tveYTmaSSmBEnt28Lbmo6HIO_SDQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ed0e24495b7640338423de9cc5c80023&_e=iVK43q0vGn_ISIB4EyY2SHF6r_MiU_DdVrxB4jtPCq0ImQ5egJ8avCrcadwDjp_BY8wgzA3vZrS1sfDfeIEK-Nba7jYVBiDhbPy57M30B1opRH7yK3tMn7k888RBgVjOqXui8A6E-R_PtYd_oBLjAGB8o3cwlcFmiLH-6aRCTCUwaS1QsjZWCx9JsFLEmSmslirA6J9zhIvrh8PoRY0pPUrwIbuh0vaYVPx-6QkP6d8FtkXcLwlo3p_9PyCWl8aRHmvNRyZjzhK4tv5DOMJrALnCD_ylY1ostEboQU5srDQFJHG5MExCFno7RQtt7N0R6p-rlBRxRYd22CZO1bGoUcVaFl2xwZh173uP0pUFMwX0x7KxNgPM3ppLDAkz1fvBN5ZNsuTTXz10_jdkLRoRdg%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r-iboT1k3o6nkfopmnK8yw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTzIIP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZWvehmxl6s2Cl1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

| | Dear Friend, [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r-iboT1k3o6nkfopmnK8yw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTzIIP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZWvehmxl6s2Cl1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r-iboT1k3o6nkfopmnK8yw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTzIIP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZWvehmxl6s2Cl1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/r-iboT1k3o6nkfopmnK8yw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTzIIP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZWvehmxl6s2Cl1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

subject: Something I never felt before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_t=xh4klju8AyJyHaxXw0hQ5kah761cySmZxWhfi_X9To5m6w0YHVnxu2OL5KxvE0NVkISUnidl9uiSg4-sVY4eywqv6wgd6o51yXT3M3F9J9A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_t=xh4klju8AyJyHaxXw0hQ5kah761cySmZxWhfi_X9To5m6w0YHVnxu2OL5KxvE0NVkISUnidl9uiSg4-sVY4eywqv6wgd6o51yXT3M3F9J9A%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Deu6PQp9iQEw-ZQgyf6gpf6hs1RtYVUwR0AGDXEyInHun5jdxJ-6Gkgh7-VwP05mjpEWdnwt-tWY2U4DQ0NcWGTv5xtoqt9aydJqRbBO3RDI-M4Vg5936AtPz19mDc0H3OSswY8ijYz_B_YVAnO3QGm9PBArAudE-5FYlSU0ng5VG7k55cSYPOBkq5x9tjq_6vEUgl1eZPbiEK8_haSBAHz0qpV4K2w8qwF2SnRX3bbKZ779idTY4yFvRY7-T79dqrWx0GlSwmXdIafQzVqkXpMhzICJsfAt4Lc7uRMxA20lSVCqhKLBougXDlDIKPVz92eks2WZJ0a8r-XVJkwt4o4lB7v_Fwxvt42mJDAOoW3cQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Deu6PQp9iQEw-ZQgyf6gpf6hs1RtYVUwR0AGDXEyInHun5jdxJ-6Gkgh7-VwP05mjpEWdnwt-tWY2U4DQ0NcWGTv5xtoqt9aydJqRbBO3RDI-M4Vg5936AtPz19mDc0H3OSswY8ijYz_B_YVAnO3QGm9PBArAudE-5FYlSU0ng5VG7k55cSYPOBkq5x9tjq_6vEUgl1eZPbiEK8_haSBAHz9og00QOUxSZqY5F4tE7BKOr-VlHpCUmCKtEZvCP49IZCizJzPy-XDfrUJN8_mu6Q1rr-XZizSbLgbxa2ZRSsxa-2pdWnlzoA2gWA9oiF9Tk-ojUuoOx1sjzn40HYE4RrKMKvpLR71j2pjsjg751Wpg%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Deu6PQp9iQEw-ZQgyf6gpf6hs1RtYVUwR0AGDXEyInHun5jdxJ-6Gkgh7-VwP05mjpEWdnwt-tWY2U4DQ0NcWGTv5xtoqt9aydJqRbBO3RDI-M4Vg5936AtPz19mDc0H3OSswY8ijYz_B_YVAnO3QGm9PBArAudE-5FYlSU0ng5VG7k55cSYPOBkq5x9tjq_6vEUgl1eZPbiEK8_haSBAHzwZY6iyxYStGqS2WqO8z1jubeikJACKRcLPgfgI1ZaHtQYfK-tkDHBK4nqCJBO5GIXuBmprrqeTFbJ6vyxBMkdvGwBCdWx8y9wXVKL2WHw9szoTulLfYrEGxnrFA5q2m-DMUHr5g9eGIQl2f24iHFMM%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Demr1zTZ3yiAokuS2xOb75Vh-2GuSwkrwgzcmKQKcmfjzGvAp2iXiXGV-_ldtoifqGv0AkrdldsqygnbKfZwkoolAUNY2xHEsWI92mNR-6jcGdjqdmgGFZvJiXL45uehAVtAL1Ynh6c1_YTFhN-Lh3u5aJPmGr6F6FvqRLmhwuvS5KoKoKHTUpqdRR5pZcsJk5SD90ldycIqpfaM-LKIo2s_XImIT8846joAOzNYVnEbB1Cew5p2IJeLIElbJ28nih0lAJMcVo2Pe-n6v4C9GPvrlhcUe6gKYBKfWi92eAWc_xWMVcYM7cgqBdXsRunoH5wZwFllHm6rENF8AhP0ygzPY9MOCi2mv2eACDXeFjDgw%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. **Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Deu6PQp9iQEw-ZQgyf6gpf6hs1RtYVUwR0AGDXEyInHun5jdxJ-6Gkgh7-VwP05mjpEWdnwt-tWY2U4DQ0NcWGTv5xtoqt9aydJqRbBO3RDI-M4Vg5936AtPz19mDc0H3OSswY8ijYz_B_YVAnO3QGm9PBArAudE-5FYlSU0ng5VG7k55cSYPOBkq5x9tjq_6vEUgl1eZPbiEK8_haSBAHz7SXj2BsRaYKsCzzhas3_yXmwo0aQDj0PqCpqa6_iZ7i25Gi2E9mLksI3jVZshG1pkVColUB317sxSYJb1mJvPqqyf5FMPulw-IMut429-1Q9aHsrSAz3Kol9iV55v1fEa3uXMzTJdXWhO1nuR0euc8%3D)

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7d2c3fe60daa46e186106f623000e31c&_e=HjbFUamwx4icg-hENrTU07GmqHaa3vB0JMXmFHGv-oJz9bVreXHRpqKzhC6li5Deu6PQp9iQEw-ZQgyf6gpf6hs1RtYVUwR0AGDXEyInHun5jdxJ-6Gkgh7-VwP05mjpEWdnwt-tWY2U4DQ0NcWGTv5xtoqt9aydJqRbBO3RDI-M4Vg5936AtPz19mDc0H3OSswY8ijYz_B_YVAnO3QGm9PBArAudE-5FYlSU0ng5VG7k55cSYPOBkq5x9tjq_6vEUgl1eZPbiEK8_haSBAHz6vpaZxNh52AedwMNrqRfyc-xXI5Fiin0A8pzbVUdHIaqezRVKJGD-srFXnypLzdjs8DK9gCfz2gjQWCvdg42aIRTKrq-eukjfXGZuwyjwOmEpqQzvplWcbFEiIrX4IrWBGLh2HyAYBnbbu7qb8S0ls%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe756022ab480497c77c2708b09d3e&_e=_y63RHI1RiLwMwSWUT2i3y9v04ADZjJxExkY8yV2XMJeDL-ApIjanMeD9321x_rkhBNxUV12a9LLOOTsd7Q3YST11pNU94jAeBcIxWC-xPbc9kf0dYx42dFsIdmlFJT7I5RTKmCudo997LFB0XcbVl2ro-KoM6qZ-xoM_0WAmCxzNYIqbb-bZSx-TlXUShdpCY1vl-PsLkTF34m0Rwc8WM5QEa4DRZo43OyiK1zH9UBrjZTbwsOzkp9a9L8jDdAAUZgg6_l8R1yDuI5h8fnZkig7RA5GE33c6xDeQHFTLYU%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe756022ab480497c77c2708b09d3e&_e=_y63RHI1RiLwMwSWUT2i3y9v04ADZjJxExkY8yV2XMJeDL-ApIjanMeD9321x_rkhBNxUV12a9LLOOTsd7Q3YST11pNU94jAeBcIxWC-xPbc9kf0dYx42dFsIdmlFJT7I5RTKmCudo997LFB0XcbVuX7F_Z4h4X9hrKVrWx772QJT_qwFdluOXadFjSIAL_0pYj87S1e2wBWItRow2I9msYWzT5SSP4SioAqKdmvSixlrmpPeRHbpYHv--YLh2toa-0cedZ0r-klnj-mBG7wEG_yPXsUf85fjOvAbSpytD0%3D)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acbe756022ab480497c77c2708b09d3e&_e=_y63RHI1RiLwMwSWUT2i3y9v04ADZjJxExkY8yV2XMJeDL-ApIjanMeD9321x_rkhBNxUV12a9LLOOTsd7Q3YST11pNU94jAeBcIxWC-xPbc9kf0dYx42dFsIdmlFJT7I5RTKmCudo997LFB0XcbVuuv4pRUAX90YtbscVkODqOofspl0_g9bUWBrHwgZXiHvVFr2hJtmhJOZ9kH7T42-r2uZ6suj5eWT05tcgRLrBVtbE7b1txoXi0No0e3zUFNKpCdlvljddorgPnmrRRLbi0UZGlk22t8k9tD6dBduG0%3D)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision to run for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Besides the day we launched, this deadline is probably the most important time of the campaign so far.
#

Peter -
On December 31st we’re going to hit our final quarterly FEC deadline of the year. After that we are legally required to report out our fundraising numbers.
Every dollar we’ve raised will be public. Everyone will be watching. Our allies, our adversaries, potential endorsers, party committees, the media.
Besides the day we launched, this deadline is probably the most important time of the campaign so far.
If we put up a good number we’ll show that we’ve got a campaign strong enough to defeat Kari Lake and win back Arizona’s Senate seat. If we show any sign of weakness, Kari Lake, National Republicans, and the MAGA-right will pounce on us.
But hang on a minute. Put that aside for a second. Because right now, I want to talk to you about my decision to run in the first place.
When I made the decision to run for Senate in Arizona, it was to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her vote in the Senate with someone who actually cares about the people of our state.
That was reason enough for me.
But Kari Lake is in the race now. The MAGA Queen. Someone who has no problem lying, spreading misinformation — even calling for her supporters to commit violence on behalf of Donald Trump.
I lived through January 6th. I heard the shouts from the mob while I was on the House floor, barricading the doors and helping my colleagues evacuate to safety. I know what Kari Lake means for our democracy.
So this final deadline — it’s not just about our fundraising. It’s not just about getting another vote in the Senate. It still is those things, but it’s about raising the money we need to win, and to defend our democracy from an existential threat.
That is a lot of pressure. Trust me... I’m feeling it. I expect you are, too. But you are not alone in this fight. I’m with you, and thousands of others are, too.
Right now, a lot of them are making donations. They’re hoping that you will join them. Because they know that is how we will win this race.
So please, I am asking you very humbly:
[**Can you contribute $3 to our campaign today? Lots and lots of people adding donations is the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s how we’ll hit our goals ahead of this FEC deadline, and it’s how we’ll defeat Kari Lake once and for all.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=1&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-dec23.c3Kc7n&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=20&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-dec23.Iu3tBv&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=21&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-dec23.WRb_0j&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=22&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-dec23.1eV3wB&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=23&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-dec23.77-ptL&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=24&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-dec23.THMJwK&refcode=em231203-1-f&t=25&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)**
---
****
There’s an old motto in the Marines: “First to Fight.” That always stuck with me. And you have my word: I’m not going to back down.
I am proud to be in this fight with you, Peter. Thank you for your continued support.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=26&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=1507_734936_OutNsW&akid=1507%2E734936%2EOutNsW)

Friend.

I'm honored to be the 56th Speaker of the House of Representatives, and I can't wait to get to work! Together, we will fight back against Joe Biden's reckless agenda and enact common sense conservative policies!

name: Doug White
subject: Central WA Dems celebrate 1M messages! Media revival, Zoom with Senators Murray & Cantwell. United for Democratic progress
body:
Democrats in Central Washington Roar!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/a3Omm01J0/c?w=5zYOxF4bUwbLFsumMrK5-Fq27KRfJjIg_DRXd6pEo2Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2EzT21tMDFKMD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Occasionally our newsletter focuses on our accomplishments and a blatant request for money. All other newsletters focus on events and information. Stick with us.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/a3Omm01J0/c?w=du80bT2lMqPxKSADvoUSav9OgligGqP3lkUUmcnd1Rw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdV95ZWFyX2VuZF8yMDIzIiwiciI6IjFkNmE3YTYxLWY2NzctNGY2ZS04OGNmLTM1N2RkYWU4OThjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | |
---
| | Celebrating One Million Delivered!
---
| | In the past four weeks, Rural Americans United’s pro-Democratic radio spots have been heard one million times by listeners throughout Central Washington! For the very first time, thousands of people have been exposed to core Democratic goals with the power to vastly improve the lives of working class people on the eastside of the Cascades. In all, RAU has committed to a $350,000, 14-month media blitz, which will blanket the 4th District with 20,000 separate radio spots. In English and Spanish, the ads are believed to be the largest public awareness campaign ever launched in the state.
---
| |
---
| | The first month of RAU’s remarkable advertising campaign was met with a wave of support pouring in from across the state, thanking us for giving them hope and representation in communities that are often subjected to intimidation and even violence against those that hold democratic values. When I write us, I mean all of us that contribute, write notes of encouragement, support candidates, run for office and so many other things. Winning is never a singular accomplishment, it takes all of us. To keep these inspiring pro-Democratic broadcast messages rolling, Rural Americans United needs your financial support. Please help us celebrate the holiday season and the New Year with great joy, knowing the lives of so many have been touched with good and sensible values. We must raise $43,000 dollars before the end of the year to keep the momentum up. [Click here](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/a3Omm01J0/c?w=T8SkCOyjb4Qd8Z_2grQOM4eS1b_VasGU4kAPImfgk1o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdV95ZWFyX2VuZF8yMDIzIiwiciI6ImI1OWFjYTRmLWY0MDktNDlmMS1iNzMzLTc0YzA5MDZkN2ZjYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) to help RAU meet this year's funding goal.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/a3Omm01J0/c?w=bfQXs9kJUMHO1XX5MDi_P0-wI1NxyknPfBO29G_HwEY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdV95ZWFyX2VuZF8yMDIzIiwiciI6IjhhODAxMGZjLWE1MTYtNGUzMi04MTA1LWRlMjFmNGRlMjVmMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---

| | Local Media GainsInterest in Democrats
---
| | We are making Central Washington Democrats newsworthy again! For thirty years or more Democrats have had little to no relationship with TV, radio and newspapers. Without solid Democratic political infrastructure, journalists seeking quotes from a Democrat are unsure where to turn. There is a continuous onslaught of Republican noise in Central Washington; but without Democratic media infrastructure, the business of creating responses and structuring information in a form that radio, TV and print journalists can use just doesn’t happen. Without sources for the Democratic side of stories, local media are left with only Republican party rhetoric while the Democratic voice diminishes.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/a3Omm01J0/c?w=ihZwoKw29u8Y4Ws65J8-1Iui02dCotkk5XhnZAJtcBY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ld3NsZXR0ZXItMTEuMDguMjMiLCJyIjoiOWZhZjkxNmUtNzNjNi00ZjNjLThiNDctZGUwZDZjNDYwMDhiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)
---
| | Starting two years ago, RAU began rebuilding these important relationships with the media to get our story out there. During the last election cycle we started to see the fruits of our efforts. We were able to get pro-Democratic articles published in papers up and down Central Washington as well as in Seattle and Spokane. Additionally, we placed articles calling out the heinous methods that local Republican parties are using to subvert the political process, undermine election integrity and unfairly sway voting to their benefit. As a result of our work, Central Washington media outlets are showing a new interest in Democrat content. We will continue to build on that success, working to increase the visibility and voice of rural Americans. Your generous support is making all the difference! A sample of publications are below.

---
| | The needs of Central Washington and the good work that our Senators are doing on our behalf will be the talking points for an upcoming Q/A. This regularly scheduled Zoom meeting is to increase the accessibility of our elected members of Congress to the people of Central Washington. We are grateful to Senate staffers Raquel Crowley and Rick Evans for their willingness to take time from their very busy schedules to speak directly with the constituents of Central Washington. Details are still being confirmed, and we will release information as it becomes available. Please note: this is a non-partisan event, the topics will be limited to our elected Senators' work in Congress and be managed through our non-partisan 501(c)3, RAU Education Fund.

clean_body: Democrats in Central Washington Roar! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | Occasionally our newsletter focuses on our accomplishments and a blatant request for money. All other newsletters focus on events and information. Stick with us. | | | | | | | Celebrating One Million Delivered! | | In the past four weeks, Rural Americans United’s pro-Democratic radio spots have been heard one million times by listeners throughout Central Washington! For the very first time, thousands of people have been exposed to core Democratic goals with the power to vastly improve the lives of working class people on the eastside of the Cascades. In all, RAU has committed to a $350,000, 14-month media blitz, which will blanket the 4th District with 20,000 separate radio spots. In English and Spanish, the ads are believed to be the largest public awareness campaign ever launched in the state. | | | | The first month of RAU’s remarkable advertising campaign was met with a wave of support pouring in from across the state, thanking us for giving them hope and representation in communities that are often subjected to intimidation and even violence against those that hold democratic values. When I write us, I mean all of us that contribute, write notes of encouragement, support candidates, run for office and so many other things. Winning is never a singular accomplishment, it takes all of us. To keep these inspiring pro-Democratic broadcast messages rolling, Rural Americans United needs your financial support. Please help us celebrate the holiday season and the New Year with great joy, knowing the lives of so many have been touched with good and sensible values. Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZeje2TH7fHo-4LgdW2UeNjnAxzph8CwpDLJ0EfMyNvJee7-ZFbuk13ZyR2omCLoE3nqv2TOqFhaz3XAVibl5bIz9PN_HlTnMZ5hIl3Ob0LPaPOpMLY1QHdv3H4RNVXXKtOR3IrVlaZQDifyksTRL28Y%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZaqLb2u_x9wX_j3Nd5ZwwHaXCvdTzXFSPDuH5qxlCA9m1-LqqCyLpM80NJfzV_C-6oDxtaCBMa_y2ypEEVXnmNJvJDO70KADySV_xABCeWPsoLTQ2dyBb8gJBIgMp8RBVTDBnPsZKCCkHKdIBLb_pmM%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPX14D1sPgaYxeEwM9q_l4ethv5p8nbE__cjnJZHBu5Cvu7_bg_ZYtotrKJpKQyJp4JG6c9AM09J7SbQgk1ZwCWTq81fk2C0RQ7gycVnyvJCFgopTEw5DY_XrL51NB60Lz4IMTLFl8u-qn9V22NvZdiL492YdGDWT6Qy6PbDIaDTKgZTZWqv8q8dkoRjlUPVu68T-hDWNFMTQ62S8zZp3k1mKRs7k8eXXmDWb0tNNP-FhcDCO_aHcabUBdUr-pyUBKce3CaoO5iB4rGwUa84jxCpGB0GFftf7oH3f_8d8uzv5JOh2R0Y34pNqWhNu5d1ZaBADNtrN7Gbsf26v7boUM-P0gd3VxIz8j4Jl31XMWjmI%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT
ENLIST WITH TIM TODAY->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZbLi-4fXmq7G6MeGZADZ5QX8HBLEmn7tOlzU3-DIsxLslKR6muar9mPRGilykfgdWUPw1opyjRYnXMaSY1Jx7Q00H4jlIw0u3weUw_oGMOUbRZvxciX0rEpjGnW1UV5kuZ3BBb0m-4-LghubeMw6Rd4%3D)

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZcTP2yvCMCxkRJSUVIgxBuUXHdXoFsbU__7NqLCLGVWlv4ccokFR7CapTDlBjGAFoib31_kx33KNm0lG7gbzEBfRLlxVXlJXWtjDpyBGdQTNFI0ZlcEjoy-sqwcqwfvUe6VlQODvH33uqBzFsJGw6K0%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZYNHOKACcoV4qvI6B_pcJg_xCzh12f-1HbJ5djx2bJ19HpRos2nzwo_N-cuHPNJ8TrcB7aYYP1BwXfuvrX2ACkbwU6TSt_S3xqkQWMIaSv7eZVZe4Xyez2udRbIwLriLaoaABufcrzN7IAv2v2G2LTU%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZSP8RACgqj0FKVs3Ip9AIrhCx5EvbqBe1idG7adUaS-vhXaW6Epn7rhfOYXXrMJPOR0suEFg9JlgvXHFircFPDVIuT8wqSNULA65_nXTZGDs6fh6xmFNq4TYadSuY5Rby8uq_UCaAQ2iJzt2mJ9dUYU%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZVtu7TSV-m-q5wLa80sfaciOGb7n-Y7ZZSMHi9Nt1TnSDo78YQMB7Bd-f5dY0iX7YU27wlB_rJl6kErzN4Wdg8d88U2MEHsLvQaRo-J_tdWSCiIvF2ae84cuICHMhhPAz_vjWDaNviMsWcPlHH4Pv3U%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT
ELECT A FIGHTER TO THE U.S. SENATE->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b70ca3fc7ce14baabe748f9c4b6f9225&_e=faHSF0FpbmhXZulVtRyZ4-8_5ZRfuA_YoCsxzq3WJ5OU2Wef9c9exnxlBpYH2goPDfAcpOheyZQDdV3gAXTej2OR-63Pzvj-ANhOMNsgytWk4Z6Anam9msTZeh0KaRErbLLXOFsI7ZmjTBZtmxMUJ3ZEfHsytTuzInl3mTLHDf-Ql4EcZEoXzn4pa7gMCR2X4glwe0VHnSOvDOEJfQcL849r-MkYIA_Dv3CTnkwSGX0NMP3u3C9KGpWcApdS69Aszs_wUhUGrr8hd_FQY8OdZYDnbRL82zFkkuuYG2Qc9iNI8YSjY6oL7YnpHPdNIdHSlw9ZcT8eUU4c2ZspWTlaS13_IWb8-zxMxBU7VwsVWf1kyW9GqjKbFG0SIBaCf34UWzyPnhcSMtlD60jVQCs_7qfhhLQhCK3LIyoIdGGebm8%3D)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Senator Tuberville is sabotaging our military because he thinks his personal politics are more important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
His stunt is a serious threat to our national security. Please let me explain.
#
Peter — in the Marines, knowingly undermining our national security would get you court-martialed and thrown in the brig.
It’s a damn shame we can’t do that in the U.S. Senate.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39576?refcode=em20231203-4302&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4302%2E614464%2EhybTmr)
Three months ago, I published an op-ed in Fox News explaining why Senator Tommy Tuberville’s already months-long blockade of military confirmations was a serious threat to our country’s national security. Not much has changed since then.
**Tuberville, and other Senators like Josh Hawley, have continued to sabotage our military because they think their personal politics are more important.**
It’s not just wrong — it’s stupid. So before I ask you to chip in toward my campaign to replace Josh Hawley, please let me share my perspective as a 13-year Marine veteran about the real impact this blockade has on service members, military families, and our national security:
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39576?refcode=em20231203-4302&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4302%2E614464%2EhybTmr)**
Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions this year. He claims he’s doing it because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions.
**So now, because he’s decided to put his personal politics ahead of the needs of our military and national security, promotions aren’t going through** — and people who’ve given decades of their lives to this country are being asked (or forced) to change their plans or not retire.
It’s the one thing they thought they had control over, now frozen in place.
People aren’t getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their families are facing uncertainty about where they’ll work or send their kids to school.
It’s just another example of our politicians using service members for political leverage. The same way they recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan.
**It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over again.**
Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. It's shameful, it's selfish, and it's stupid because it also damages our national security.
**I saw the impact for myself when I was representing the US in arms control negotiations with NATO allies and Russia from 2016 to 2019.** When you've got American officers with lower ranks going up against generals and admirals in critical meetings and negotiations — our allies, our partners, other countries, and our adversaries notice. Russia and China, they notice too.
This blockade means dozens, if not hundreds, of military officers are going to have to explain why the US is sending significantly lower ranks than their counterparts to critical meetings and negotiations around the globe.
When China sends a high-ranking general to meet with a third country and we send a one-star acting commander, that undermines our country, our position, and our national security. It's going to look like we don't care, it's going to look like we aren't serious, and people are going to question our country's resolve.
**Weakening the position of our representatives overseas weakens our national security. Period. And that's exactly what Senator Tuberville is doing.**
We can’t afford to let Tuberville and Hawley spend anymore time sabotaging our troops or our national security — and that’s just part of the reason why I’m running to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday people.
I want to be a real voice for service members, veterans, and working people all across the country. And I’m committed to standing up to any corrupt politician like Tuberville who tries to get in my way. But I can’t do it without your help:
**[So Peter, will you add a donation of whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors — so you’ll always know I’m standing up for real, everyday people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39576?refcode=em20231203-4302&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4302%2E614464%2EhybTmr)**
