clean_body: His stunt is a serious threat to our national security. Please let me explain. Peter — in the Marines, knowingly undermining our national security would get you court-martialed and thrown in the brig. It’s a damn shame we can’t do that in the U.S. Senate. Three months ago, I published an op-ed in Fox News explaining why Senator Tommy Tuberville’s already months-long blockade of military confirmations was a serious threat to our country’s national security. Not much has changed since then. Tuberville, and other Senators like Josh Hawley, have continued to sabotage our military because they think their personal politics are more important. It’s not just wrong — it’s stupid. So before I ask you to chip in toward my campaign to replace Josh Hawley, please let me share my perspective as a 13-year Marine veteran about the real impact this blockade has on service members, military families, and our national security: Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions this year. He claims he’s doing it because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions. So now, because he’s decided to put his personal politics ahead of the needs of our military and national security, promotions aren’t going through — and people who’ve given decades of their lives to this country are being asked (or forced) to change their plans or not retire. It’s the one thing they thought they had control over, now frozen in place. People aren’t getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their families are facing uncertainty about where they’ll work or send their kids to school. It’s just another example of our politicians using service members for political leverage. The same way they recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan. It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over again. Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: a step back and a thank-you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Team, it's official:
| | |
---
Team, it's official: 2024 is less than a month away. It's hard to believe how fast the first couple of months of this campaign have flown by — and how much we've accomplished in that time.
**Before this campaign enters high gear in 2024, I want to take a moment to reflect on everything that we've accomplished and personally thank you for being one of my earliest supporters.[(If you're short on time, thank you for all that you've done. We've got a long road ahead of us, and I need reliable people like you by my side. Will you chip in a donation here to keep our campaign on track for victory?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74485975/441760916/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MzBjNmUtZWY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xp_I16meRpHsr3DlevWDFFeYgapU0LfgSw6Mb5fwT4M=)**
Just a few months ago, there were plenty of people out there who wrote off Florida. They never imagined that so many people would rally against Rick Scott. They never imagined that a grassroots team could outraise a _megamillionaire._ They never imagined that we could make this race a statistical tie and one of the most likely seats to flip blue in 2024.
_But we've proved them wrong._**Because, in this country, if you believe enough, if you work hard enough, and if you have enough courage, you can do what some might believe is impossible.** It's a lesson I've learned over and over again — in the stories I've heard from families across Florida and in my own life.
I came to America as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, my mom worked double shifts, and I found a minimum wage job to help pay the bills. Achieving our American dream wasn't easy. But eventually, I was able to give back to my community and serve Florida as the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
My family's story is one of courage. It’s a story of hardwork, perseverance, and an unwavering belief in what is possible in this country. And it's a story that I share with millions of Americans.
Anything is possible in America if you're willing to fight for it. _That's why I know that we're going to win in 2024_. The incredible people who make up this team — people like you, friend — have proven that they'll never give up. **We won't rest until we've defeated Rick Scott, maintained our Senate Majority, and restored the promise of America that he's worked so hard to undermine.**
Thank you so much for being one of the very first people to believe in my campaign. Now, as 2023 comes to a close, it's up to us to continue this fight into the election year. We'll only defeat Rick Scott if we keep this momentum going. That's why I have to ask once again:
**[If you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation right now to power our campaign into 2024 so that we have the resources to defeat Rick Scott? We can win, but only if we stand united, every single step of the way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74485976/441760917/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MzBjNmUtZWY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xp_I16meRpHsr3DlevWDFFeYgapU0LfgSw6Mb5fwT4M=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74485977/441760918/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MzBjNmUtZWY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xp_I16meRpHsr3DlevWDFFeYgapU0LfgSw6Mb5fwT4M=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74485978/441760919/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MzBjNmUtZWY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xp_I16meRpHsr3DlevWDFFeYgapU0LfgSw6Mb5fwT4M=)

| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74485980/441760921/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk328-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ2MzBjNmUtZWY5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xp_I16meRpHsr3DlevWDFFeYgapU0LfgSw6Mb5fwT4M=)

_Ya ... no ... más._ Enough is enough. In 2024, we're winning for Floridians the leadership and future that they truly deserve.
With gratitude,

Debbie

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Hill Harper
subject: Take on Big Oil’s price-hiking with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
The real way to lower gas prices...
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231203-1&t=1&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)
Peter, people say Democrats and Republicans disagree about everything.
But I don’t really think that’s true! Across Michigan, I talk to Dems, Republicans, Independents, and everyone in between — and many of their concerns are the same, the kind of problems that creep into all our daily lives.
A prime example is the ridiculous amount we’re all paying at the gas pump.
Gas could be cheaper right now. Seriously, Peter. Big Oil companies like ExxonMobil and Chevron are raking in MASSIVE profits — to the tune of tens of billions a quarter — by raising prices as high as they can go and blaming inflation.
They get away with it by using some of their endless cash to lobby and influence the politicians who should be holding them accountable.
This really isn’t about red or blue. I’m speaking for everyday Michiganders of all stripes when I say: to lower sky-high gas prices, we’ve got to get corporate money out of politics.
**[If you agree, I’m going to ask for your support today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1-648&refcode2=648_62735_t5bFAn&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)** I don’t take a cent from Big Oil or any other corporate special interest group trying to buy influence.
(In fact, I recently made the news for refusing a mega-donor’s offer of $20 million to drop out of this race and run against Rashida Tlaib...)
But if we’re going to actually win this race and uncorrupt this broken system, I’m going to need so much help. It takes a LOT of online donations from folks like you to take on the establishment’s deep pockets.
**[Take on Big Oil’s price-hiking by kicking in a donation to our 100% people-powered campaign. I’d be honored by your support as we take on some of the most corrupt forces in politics.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1-648&refcode2=648_62735_t5bFAn&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231203-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231203-1-648&refcode2=648_62735_t5bFAn&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)**
Thank you for believing in this fight,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231203-1&t=2&refcode2=648_62735_t5bFAn&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=648%2E62735%2Et5bFAn)

name: Tim
subject: Proud announcement
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Peter, Yesterday, I was elected Chair of the Democratic Governors Association. This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and I couldn’t be more excited to get to work.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74486890/441764195/-2136572610?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E2YjRkMy1mMDkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-WHMyPHuwDarSkpefOGihUUR9EzyWQYESgAl7cYy5w=)

Peter,
Yesterday, I was elected Chair of the Democratic Governors Association. This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and I couldn’t be more excited to get to work.
In this new role, I will be leading the fight to elect Democratic governors across the country – leaders who will help us stand up to the forces of hate and bigotry that are on the march across the country.
From banning books to attacking the LGBTQ+ community to ripping away reproductive rights and more, the Republican Party has fallen deeply out of step with a large majority of Americans.
But even so, we have an extremely tough fight ahead of us over the next year. Republicans are outraising Democrats across the country, and Donald Trump is polling ahead of President Biden in five critical swing states.
**The warning signs are clear, Peter. We cannot afford to make the same mistakes we made in 2016. **
I believe with all my heart that every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. But we must come together and get to work.

name: Oregon Senate 13
subject: Measure 113 court case update
body:
| December 14th coming up! update below
---
[View online version](https://02i5g.mjt.lu/nl3/WdStTF35-ud-XLQFzZH-OQ?m=AWAAAC4wDR0AAAADAOAAAEmqwukAAAAAohEAAOHyABviMQBlbKHy1BICyVSbRVec2HorTaRX8wAasDI&b=ed5af358&e=9548fb47&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ)
---
| |
---
|
# **Even Tina Kotek does not want walkouts**
---
Oregon's 13 Senators who worked together to defeat the horrible agenda of the Democrats has their day in court coming up December 14th in Oregon Supreme Court. These Senators were elected by their voters and should be allowed to serve them. Let their voters decide, not Portland Democrats. Governor Kotek was on OPB this past month and even she agreed Senate Democrats got what they deserved. “I’m doing everything I can to make sure (another walkout) doesn’t happen. I’ve been very clear with legislative leaders — we have to have more open dialogue now about how we want the session to go and how we can work together on the top issues facing the state. What’s good about housing production? It is a bipartisan priority. I’m trying to keep people focused on bipartisan priorities so we can have a successful legislative session.” - Governor Kotek on OPBShe continued... "This is a short session to be focused on the priorities of the state.”“Nothing in the law at the end of the day will be foolproof for keeping us from walkouts. **This is about the relationships you build, how you treat each other, how you treat folks who aren’t in the majority.** I think we have work to do there.”If Democrats would treat Republicans and those not living in Portland with more respect, we could find the "Oregon Way" again. We have hired the best attorney's and have gone all in to try and save our Oregon. We hope you will join us in the battle by donating anything you can.
**Senators Knopp, Findley and Linthicum will be going to the Supreme Court on December 14th at 1:30pm.**
| [](https://02i5g.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAAC4wDR0AAAADAOAAAEmqwukAAAAAohEAAOHyABviMQBlbKHy1BICyVSbRVec2HorTaRX8wAasDI/1/ytejgongduYfeW5Su54vDA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9vcmVnb24tcy0xMy1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1kZWZlbnNlLWZ1bmQvZG9uYXRlLW5vdz9zYz13aW5yZWQtZGlyZWN0b3J5Jm1vbmV5X2JvbWI9ZmFsc2UmcmVjdXJyaW5nPWZhbHNl)
---
| |
---
See the response from the Supreme Court in regards to our case. It should be a very interesting case to hear as it is David vs. Goliath. The plain language of Measure 113 should win over political voter intent.
---
| |
---
The oral argument schedule is ready to go on the 14th of December. This is our opportunity to be heard by the courts and win the day for Oregonians.
---
| | [](https://02i5g.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAAC4wDR0AAAADAOAAAEmqwukAAAAAohEAAOHyABviMQBlbKHy1BICyVSbRVec2HorTaRX8wAasDI/2/FRQRRMQE6Q6jhB0Ley1fwA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9vcmVnb24tcy0xMy1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1kZWZlbnNlLWZ1bmQvc3RvcmVmcm9udC8)
---
| | [_DONATE TODAY TO HELP US FIGHT DEMOCRATS _](https://02i5g.mjt.lu/lnk/AWAAAC4wDR0AAAADAOAAAEmqwukAAAAAohEAAOHyABviMQBlbKHy1BICyVSbRVec2HorTaRX8wAasDI/3/Kq5UvaPFG-kXa6I5vrk_WA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9vcmVnb24tcy0xMy1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1kZWZlbnNlLWZ1bmQvZG9uYXRlLW5vdz9zYz13aW5yZWQtZGlyZWN0b3J5Jm1vbmV5X2JvbWI9ZmFsc2UmcmVjdXJyaW5nPWZhbHNl)

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uSpxUP-_BCmMsMUZNFR39Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT0EIP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fQUZSXzIwMjMxMjAzVwNzcGNCCmVrzqJsZerNJdNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uSpxUP-_BCmMsMUZNFR39Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT0EIP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fQUZSXzIwMjMxMjAzVwNzcGNCCmVrzqJsZerNJdNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uSpxUP-_BCmMsMUZNFR39Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT0EIP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fQUZSXzIwMjMxMjAzVwNzcGNCCmVrzqJsZerNJdNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uSpxUP-_BCmMsMUZNFR39Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT0EIP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fQUZSXzIwMjMxMjAzVwNzcGNCCmVrzqJsZerNJdNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MDvSWuDFu-WrYUD9U2gAsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT04oP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgplawijbGWjq_r2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MDvSWuDFu-WrYUD9U2gAsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT04oP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgplawijbGWjq_r2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MDvSWuDFu-WrYUD9U2gAsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT04oP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgplawijbGWjq_r2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MDvSWuDFu-WrYUD9U2gAsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnT04oP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwM1cDc3BjQgplawijbGWjq_r2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I’d never had thoughts like this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=bc9623a206db476d997c814d288646ba&_t=ifNTjMwYGi8KgnlmCRaOh6LoTxka4pJoNWwzOuC_FlRaxuzv_nPfnWilv2-ZcRf8DeAc7hGJtgcd-KK2Jy68UYBk3qAymQM1cFOhUV9LZ4E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=bc9623a206db476d997c814d288646ba&_t=ifNTjMwYGi8KgnlmCRaOh6LoTxka4pJoNWwzOuC_FlRaxuzv_nPfnWilv2-ZcRf8DeAc7hGJtgcd-KK2Jy68UYBk3qAymQM1cFOhUV9LZ4E%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bc9623a206db476d997c814d288646ba&_e=pCJ7YiHD7nivYfKFRT8rvbIO7JECzxC-0_-BX_o01dsYPAZRMj2vikCSDOyhvWOwKXVPN3AvnR6kPnd44kUX0uVaPDKxipvH9_KmwZKxBZQ9Z5PAojRMiX91ypN6MN4bnNyQy_FVwN8MK0cEQhfqwaJkVvNq3GpSAgyu4bGM7ecFYrhq2vpkigIM-GjgtmNm-GJGtqCY5nBgOW69mJPtK6GIdEwxuNAa9hJ_ksuFp4MkVvFWwpyOFuKqH4ZzPsabhVoibQgPx1NK-SXqO2NFUwuHMAx38yT7HtdPR3lAHTPEeTWbRr9_mOy3Bl9KPRfZswMhmfnNViwF0T2uDrXHq1TnkVFG9Ub-LXkFQ1h8g-sMtYUE7LK4ZEMtmJe7Ih1nYfV_1BhnDwnlTqVTBJ_gWPbcCe6YBAPTEUfENkNslP4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bc9623a206db476d997c814d288646ba&_e=pCJ7YiHD7nivYfKFRT8rvbIO7JECzxC-0_-BX_o01dsYPAZRMj2vikCSDOyhvWOwKXVPN3AvnR6kPnd44kUX0uVaPDKxipvH9_KmwZKxBZQ9Z5PAojRMiX91ypN6MN4bnNyQy_FVwN8MK0cEQhfqwaJkVvNq3GpSAgyu4bGM7ecFYrhq2vpkigIM-GjgtmNm-GJGtqCY5nBgOW69mJPtK6GIdEwxuNAa9hJ_ksuFp4MkVvFWwpyOFuKqH4ZzPsabhVoibQgPx1NK-SXqO2NFU6ViqPEDykNIWL5vkKM4XwJgE86a5U7lmQkc_-SoDTVxj3RFI-khV9UFgWTsN9AEjec2ev6-LuSLG6ZiiZjGU1O8XWoKFaxvSRd3sre4oZE9V0d-j1rS1_msLc92L3_36ICQFpIzmYJMnSVli5-LcjA%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bc9623a206db476d997c814d288646ba&_e=pCJ7YiHD7nivYfKFRT8rvbIO7JECzxC-0_-BX_o01dsYPAZRMj2vikCSDOyhvWOwKXVPN3AvnR6kPnd44kUX0uVaPDKxipvH9_KmwZKxBZQ9Z5PAojRMiX91ypN6MN4bnNyQy_FVwN8MK0cEQhfqwaJkVvNq3GpSAgyu4bGM7ecFYrhq2vpkigIM-GjgtmNm-GJGtqCY5nBgOW69mJPtK6GIdEwxuNAa9hJ_ksuFp4MkVvFWwpyOFuKqH4ZzPsabhVoibQgPx1NK-SXqO2NFU47VF65c6Ney97D5Z1lDxKMs3fHSUJH6ODmB4ZAXSI1pYc1vJN9WKA3f27mM_pVx196ENqca8GqyJ0WyH0Rxhvv-RybtXKgZA562Y0_mevNlK_-ebwXyCFoAWm0Ii6LYR39YPqSifTpA-I0Yy_zB33U%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson is in New York City at this very moment, where he and a group of ultra-wealthy establishment donors are gearing up to host a lavish MAGA fundraising event for New York House Republicans — including my opponent, Anthony D'Esposito. How lavish? Put it this way: **tickets to attend the event are going for as much as _$100,000_.** Mike Johnson knows that the GOP’s backward policies don’t resonate with voters, so he has to rely on the GOP machine’s mega-money donors to buy this seat. He’ll do whatever it takes to keep lackeys like Anthony D’Esposito safe and push his extreme anti-choice, anti-democracy, anti-freedom agenda onto the American people. **Mike Johnson’s heavy presence in New York isn’t only a threat to this competitive seat but also our chances to flip the House blue next year.** While my opponent takes fat checks from party bosses, I rely on grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution – no matter the size – is the best way to fight back and show the GOP that their presence isn’t welcome here. **_[QUICK: I need 500 grassroots donors to step up with a donation before the event is over, so we can build enough firepower to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. subject: Could change everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c3012290b4f41ca8a91b6ae5f399a06&_e=E262YLcAl8YozytO5XP_t4wCRfZjaQ6bWPCt8XYqz6RVtcORUpyE8KMyxRTLCwL6BGOCvZxSik8aApST681rhIbb1z0BaAl9U7oAt9irX3md-bNO529xiUc34j5FRE7CQExst9Dc-SYyI-1BOBGkqACu6RSGNT-XYiR11MGlG8xo-PD_6ox7YR7eBMUGS8GbBBp6_-8CaCNX4Et5c8pfnjDWaVBl-mxw323C3eSTqmWGFPJa2s1fg45CcHaM0IT7KL7P9yGZompOQFl-Gx7C1NVU65SVQF7JyQTV5iVW7FtbWQW-7Xd1H8RqpL1AIfu3WUt1s0SPf9Uc4NrbG7FKzFyKEqNRyV__JOHKtVQelbxSRYuzt6D3qawF-q2CDbri7DHa7htAVlSUmmLUP3lZTg%3D%3D)
Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force
---
Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c3012290b4f41ca8a91b6ae5f399a06&_e=E262YLcAl8YozytO5XP_t4wCRfZjaQ6bWPCt8XYqz6RVtcORUpyE8KMyxRTLCwL6BGOCvZxSik8aApST681rhIbb1z0BaAl9U7oAt9irX3md-bNO529xiUc34j5FRE7CQExst9Dc-SYyI-1BOBGkqACu6RSGNT-XYiR11MGlG8xo-PD_6ox7YR7eBMUGS8GbBBp6_-8CaCNX4Et5c8pfnjDWaVBl-mxw323C3eSTqmWGFPJa2s1fg45CcHaM0IT7Bnnb9hzQSAp-qcuZk79JYWMNlM0CvQoof5s2EFnorDIablgbODn3zMV0LEXPhUS1jlfpX6fB1q9Skmg1nXnnTf34S5UiNFF5DIOiZLfPMuAMJlvN6-DjIzi7QqsogLQLxF73ZiV-NmzU6Ylg9P89Lg%3D%3D)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74489410/441773464/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231203_e_eomty_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUxOTYzNi1mNTkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NuTJ-NeVKl2NMAwxPefsPBimG1ux3B2prpvylU_DuY=&emci=e9519636-f591-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=eb519636-f591-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1037277)

| | Let me start by saying _**thank you.**_ As we kick off December, I wanted to share how incredibly grateful we are for your support. In my time at Fair Fight Action, I’ve seen firsthand how powerful it is when supporters like you come together to help make elections freer and fairer. Whether you’ve spoken out in support of pro-democracy laws and against voter suppression, or chipped in when you can, I want to thank you. **This pro-voter movement is only possible because of activists like you. ** Together, we’ve made major strides fighting back against voter suppression. And we’ve put up a massive effort to ensure every voter has an equal opportunity to make their voice heard and be fairly represented. At the same time, we’re also merely a matter of weeks from the beginning of 2024. Our team is laying the groundwork now to remove barriers between voters and the ballot box — in Georgia and around the nation — in this critical election year. As we get ready for another busy cycle, we’re grateful for your support — it helps make all of this work possible. Thank you again for being a part of this grassroots team. Sincerely, Maya C.

clean_body: | | | | This is our chance... Friend, Now that we are entering a MAJOR election year, I’m assembling an elite team of my top supporters – my Senate Rescue Team (SRT). And I’m inviting you to join,** Friend. In fact, this is so important that I’m requesting a list of all supporters who claim their Senate Rescue Team (SRT) Membership by MIDNIGHT tonight. Your Membership is absolutely critical to ensuring that we’re able to retake the Senate 2024 – and it could even determine the fate of our nation. Because without common sense conservatives who love this country, and the Constitution it was founded on – our country will never be the same.. This is your chance to save our great country, Friend. | We are entering one of the most critical election years of our lifetime. It’s up to us to ensure we have a strong start, that will carry us through the many challenges that we will no doubt face. But a strong start isn’t possible without your support,** Friend. So, can I count on you? | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Senator Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \-

name: The Courier Newsroom Team
subject: An update on George Santos
body:
With Friday's House expulsion vote, Santos is (finally) facing some accountability — but it didn’t have to get this far.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491496/441780479/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzNlMzQtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zE7Lgo7REpQlYiqOGM0MK2Sp3UjZVTZCS0DCk9VKFU0=&emci=d23c4beb-5790-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4d3c3e34-f991-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
George Santos now has the unique distinction of becoming one of six House representatives expelled from Congress.
This comes on the heels of an explosive report from the House Ethics Committee earlier last month that detailed much of what federal investigators and prosecutors have uncovered about Santos thus far.
The former freshman Congressman from New York is finally facing accountability — after being indicted on a slew of federal charges, including money laundering and stealing public funds. And it comes nearly a year after Santos was exposed as a fraud, telling countless, outrageous lies to get into Congress — **but it never had to get this far.**
Local newsrooms like ours are usually the first to uncover corruption and misconduct in politics. But with more and more local newsrooms being shuttered, there aren’t reliable sources to expose bad actors like George Santos _**before**_ they make it to Congress.
[**At Courier Newsroom, we've launched local newsrooms in nine battleground states to fill in these gaps in coverage. Our dedicated, on-the-ground reporters are holding elected officials accountable and keeping their communities informed — but to power their work, we need your help. Will you chip in $5 now to fuel our news teams?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491498/441780480/-1148522626?refcode=em20231203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzNlMzQtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zE7Lgo7REpQlYiqOGM0MK2Sp3UjZVTZCS0DCk9VKFU0=)
To recap, the list of lies Santos told to get elected to Congress is long and despicable — including his claims that his mother survived the 9/11 terrorist attacks and that he had employees killed in the Pulse nightclub shooting.
**And the fact that Santos almost got away with it says a lot about the state of the news media in 2023.**
The disappearance of local newsrooms means stories like this of fraud and corruption can slip through the cracks. Courier Newsroom was founded because we understand that **local newsrooms are the eyes and ears of our communities.**
But to provide this critical local news coverage, we need the resources to hire and retain talented local reporters and keep the lights on in our existing newsrooms and open new ones.
[**Will you help us stop bad information in its tracks and hold our elected officials accountable by pitching in $5 to support our local news teams now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491500/441780482/-1148522626?refcode=em20231203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzNlMzQtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zE7Lgo7REpQlYiqOGM0MK2Sp3UjZVTZCS0DCk9VKFU0=)
**[Pitch in $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491502/441780484/-1148522626?refcode=em20231203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQzYzNlMzQtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zE7Lgo7REpQlYiqOGM0MK2Sp3UjZVTZCS0DCk9VKFU0=)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

body:
The new MAGA Republican health care plan just dropped. We’re sure you’ve heard it before. |
#
---
Team, MAGA Republicans are coming after our health care — **again.** After trying — and failing — to repeal Obamacare more than 70 times, Donald Trump and MAGA extremists are reviving their efforts to rip away health coverage from tens of millions of Americans who rely on Obamacare. The results could be catastrophic. Millions of middle-class families and hardworking Americans rely on Obamacare for lower health costs and the ability to receive coverage for their preexisting conditions. And if Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have their way, they could all be kicked off of their health care. To make matters worse, they would have no plan to address the chaos that would ensue if millions of people were suddenly kicked off of their health plans. **Friend, we cannot let that happen.** President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats have worked extremely hard to lower health premiums and make coverage more affordable and accessible. But that could all be in jeopardy if Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans win in 2024. **[If you support President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democratic efforts to protect our health care and fight like hell against the MAGA extremists who want to take it away, please donate to Fight like Hell PAC today, and help us win up and down the ballot in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491593/441780703/751862923?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231203_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ1N2I3NWEtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PmN6vjwviLEu-Qc1is1MyvIFTifAaI8xUdmwe4Ao5x4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74491594/441780704/751862923?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231203_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ1N2I3NWEtZjk5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PmN6vjwviLEu-Qc1is1MyvIFTifAaI8xUdmwe4Ao5x4=)

clean_body: The new MAGA Republican health care plan just dropped. We’re sure you’ve heard it before. | Team, MAGA Republicans are coming after our health care — again. After trying — and failing — to repeal Obamacare more than 70 times, Donald Trump and MAGA extremists are reviving their efforts to rip away health coverage from tens of millions of Americans who rely on Obamacare. The results could be catastrophic. Millions of middle-class families and hardworking Americans rely on Obamacare for lower health costs and the ability to receive coverage for their preexisting conditions. And if Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have their way, they could all be kicked off of their health care. To make matters worse, they would have no plan to address the chaos that would ensue if millions of people were suddenly kicked off of their health plans. Friend, we cannot let that happen. President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats have worked extremely hard to lower health premiums and make coverage more affordable and accessible. But that could all be in jeopardy if Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans win in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Donald Trump and MAGA extremists will not touch our health care as long as we stand together in this fight. — Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: CRITICAL BORDER ALERT
subject: We need your help to secure the border
body:
| | | Fellow conservative, We’re writing to you because we need your urgent help.

Our border policy survey expires at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, and we still haven’t heard from you.

If we’re going to secure our border, we want to make sure we’re doing it right, and that’s why we’re asking for the input of as many patriots as possible.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Poverty is a policy choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every day, we have the opportunity to be champions for change by supporting progressive leaders who are not afraid to stand up to the status quo.
#
Peter,
It’s pretty simple. Poverty is a policy choice. Hunger is a policy choice. Extreme wealth inequality is a policy choice.
If we continue allowing our democracy to be corrupted by the same politicians who put profits over people, pander to billionaire donors, and take orders from corporate lobbyists, _this will be our reality for the foreseeable future._
That’s why we are dedicated and determined to support Pramila and our progressive campaign**— even in the midst of all of this GOP-led chaos.**
**Every day, we have the opportunity to be champions for change by supporting progressive leaders who are not afraid to stand up to the status quo.**
[**If you stand with Pramila and our collective work to build the democracy we deserve, please chip in $3 today to strengthen our efforts.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47910?t=1&akid=3233%2E420207%2EASRwv2)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47910?t=20&akid=3233%2E420207%2EASRwv2)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema’s next move
body:
2024 is right around the corner | | | Peter – If you didn’t hear, Mitt Romney’s new book spilled the beans about Kyrsten Sinema’s plans for a post-Senate career: she said she can serve on any corporate board she wants to, because she saved the filibuster! [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wPiF8g42c_5NN_XuRPIN2ENr7vo7bozSbXP4LIgh7jCEFTLUaM14s99292xXKOGLXdxHHmPlc-V_8h4d_d5O3Tu4okaKWDZng3alE8hDOJpqFxksZZ_C8dXwzpJlD5724I1c8pfAnWHlRmBKwwLfCxwWIm5dSkIwdcqehNVNGILQSDQ0N8_MTFka0Xsqmy8BuO3rxL45KZFd1uTEyTNmhj1_Ja_92KkZNRNoUcEQYFh3pKyXHoPsHUuaQcWsQn3EFi5Kphdb8jZzPVyyzYcMBg/41t/9pZHZyIyRNWlvXW7UtwBXQ/h0/ZWvd8I5lyESq1qMUQi2-Nr3dfwzSyzrKMqCwHRsUV2E) Here’s the thing about corporate boards: they’re an easy way for well-connected people to make a lot of money. And here’s the thing about Kyrsten Sinema: she loves money. We filed an FEC complaint against her because she was CAUGHT using donor money to fly to Paris, London, Barcelona and elsewhere, staying at fancy hotels, eating at fancy restaurants, and buying fancy wine. She’s even used donor money to subsidize her expensive athletic hobby. When she runs the Boston Marathon, she stays at the Ritz Carlton – on her political donors’ dime. **_[Help us make sure this is Kyrsten Sinema’s LAST term in office – so she can go sit on those corporate boards even sooner. clean_body: 2024 is right around the corner | | | Peter – If you didn’t hear, Mitt Romney’s new book spilled the beans about Kyrsten Sinema’s plans for a post-Senate career: she said she can serve on any corporate board she wants to, because she saved the filibuster! Here’s the thing about corporate boards: they’re an easy way for well-connected people to make a lot of money. And here’s the thing about Kyrsten Sinema: she loves money. We filed an FEC complaint against her because she was CAUGHT using donor money to fly to Paris, London, Barcelona and elsewhere, staying at fancy hotels, eating at fancy restaurants, and buying fancy wine. She’s even used donor money to subsidize her expensive athletic hobby. When she runs the Boston Marathon, she stays at the Ritz Carlton – on her political donors’ dime. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for holding Sinema accountable, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . subject: I’m proud to endorse Angela Alsobrooks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8TMbBMeH3iKrbQbgaULvbZxP8NfdfPp8G6-X-7Ji3_-Fv_-8HdTNiDePcp-g9iEs_AafWNg3tKTa9COD2fSPSgKSOZ0urv8Slidc5bBsjGgUl3snkO6bSsJ4A-vup590x-osVEV5wuWmGAjTZkX3ZmD6_IqYrKgbszdMToU-TIJUMYYE63twX9UeYtWIPA-W7suYYmZMGHmZmx-Ufb9SVso3jhisHbOPcexzW7poAj9aGYlz38ovb5tJ7-YktEG-NRYTjQhiMP5sWKqt9esu0odilHv_Hjybh5YpwKRykPymKewwMIw1ZpvQX7ewWFjaBJDX2fannuAunG7-ds6JQ0tDxmK_70ZdTFeQsKHskOqo6zpToc-m-t62vaNCPiE9UQ/41t/FuzZo47wRceP4oZ9Hv2BGA/h0/o59FPOu_-cdvp7Zzvwkuo_c4d2zl5VkMypCNeBOK9h8) | | Peter, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks for Senate right here in Maryland. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27kmK7IMYQk-OAR1jgbr_PGaqrhgZIzaEfOOgjGPjctlUkCiBdKqlzJR9DLkwfDcier5dC5MGzzKIA-la9tJUOgt4HUf0ribmbTioa9MEAxN3_dX3qMtOd1hk1tRTx_eXu0yVbko8Dn50fGX3l11hAvlk99yc1gPwbZsrfVEz-T_XmGXW1FIftNCj45YFxd9rqPW235ERkzjz1f-tNBdAmXCSrRvfih2JVQwHmhUuS3ZA4RH_rHEz0RINqfJsyOM78wfYSZq_cJivknITPO69Tp5by3JS_xEbqaqHnP95i1J1FkZFUqUN3-ZOnipruZgW36pdpGDjWk66gxCIsSlhbiIV2Allq-u8wnHemb1Wtmj0/41t/FuzZo47wRceP4oZ9Hv2BGA/h1/SGDgxqsPkPv3Wvnk9RKeAGUWO-ymFMX3UfjAy-BF2yQ) The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela.

For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for working families because she grew up in a working family.

Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter.

**As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources early on to set the foundation to win.[Join me today in supporting Angela for the Senate by making a split contribution toward her campaign and The Collective PAC right now. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27kmK7IMYQk-OAR1jgbr_PGaqrhgZIzaEfOOgjGPjctlUkCiBdKqlzJR9DLkwfDcier5dC5MGzzKIA-la9tJUOgp2X4KPVqbltWwPL--BaKNB4D72VVrx6zFzuPYKJ_XOVqqeEBnTAry93Taj12OwRz0xgxqQ7RDRd8YkjL5tiuocKK-aVXNIPxyhlk41fuyq2frMsWoZZc1L58wwTp1bHmhvIatpKvanTe3ysJEsk9Ke8PUH2u6p6piKgRpd2hlHZWKjj1FIxAvCV_meudXMRDBbjuPjFGUu301EOTPtaUCjBLCyH5Bbtjvg2I7Asd2_vO0oZxtWDvSgeYmd9RC4KBTTcDAACSX_rhH9acJVJn4A/41t/FuzZo47wRceP4oZ9Hv2BGA/h2/AHXYENf20yYRphuoDaWn-dDfuUMul3lblipC4gOsr6k)** | | [DONATE](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27kmK7IMYQk-OAR1jgbr_PGaqrhgZIzaEfOOgjGPjctlUkCiBdKqlzJR9DLkwfDcier5dC5MGzzKIA-la9tJUOgkgSipg6Ybkqk4BINM2SnQQIX6xV7DvQrHbLCSxH-p0_QiWmWbI_2f00jMpwuilDDdU7YAA-aeecN4GmZess7VlkOJFoIDguSIWIS-OWpwbnCdDLx8V25moIAl9wYetStkPHxjuyYcaHieiWcxJZxPkQ1KuHHWIyDusLdq-WhdeTP2N-qGs8VuefkDB4ZkXMoS7BRltwzXq8-HEj7iDWAJ-FdYtjwzu-T0Wb0q5lS7b4z67QRU8bgbQGYrjgZx9B6XfHKHRepQQB5_oY7UMKSqk/41t/FuzZo47wRceP4oZ9Hv2BGA/h3/CT_d-4YCRH1H3eH5dnaAn2HOqvQBffBH2-MEgx2ZPXc)

When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in Maryland.

Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state, a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland.

I am proud to endorse Angela because I know she is the best person to represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her race for the Senate. **I am supporting her because of what she would mean for the Senate, and splitting a contribution right now between her campaign and The Collective PAC is the best way to show her Maryland is on her side.[Your contribution will make a big difference for Angela’s campaign — make a donation today. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27kmK7IMYQk-OAR1jgbr_PGaqrhgZIzaEfOOgjGPjctlUkCiBdKqlzJR9DLkwfDcier5dC5MGzzKIA-la9tJUOgjXjVnZ-PkSOOUHSehMNEc_nO6mnsjPVzoGG6QTvBhzSWwx7uG5KOztMQ-hgV6d7E4l4dnKQ54DOBKFPSn7q7UgwBgvIDBD-WLYrao5ibXOzgkwZ3JEB8gkey7Jo-CEp6FgGtElmfvIpDUAy8a4x7f7sGnuac00lk2AVaxh8BrPhXriQFdP62MvKJ6EWHvkk6EbHx0iwUy-2DFy7JJQvmS2JdGiYYVad1JjREie0sZ7sFdUpVAgDL2NQqfCKgAGMi8wrJmyc8M532tAbmzMTvZ8/41t/FuzZo47wRceP4oZ9Hv2BGA/h4/KOw-I8u8NUBAWKrAae3JjHRpYeiYiBzMi_rp9pDDFLs)**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks for Senate right here in Maryland. The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela. For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for working families because she grew up in a working family. Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter. As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources early on to set the foundation to win. | | When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in Maryland. Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state, a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland. I am proud to endorse Angela because I know she is the best person to represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her race for the Senate. I am supporting her because of what she would mean for the Senate, and splitting a contribution right now between her campaign and The Collective PAC is the best way to show her Maryland is on her side. | Elevate, Wes Moore The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. As neighboring states have hurt workers through right-to-work laws, the people of Illinois voted to enshrine worker’s rights into our state constitution in 2022. When other states ban books, Illinois has protected our freedom to learn by banning book bans. When other states try to pull us back, it is Illinois that pushes forward. **Uplift Illinois strives to find, support and train the next generation of state and local leaders and give them the support and guidance they need.** We also need to make sure we not only keep our Democratic supermajority in Springfield but expand it. Your support will go to helping provide candidates from School Board to Senate, along with local groups the support they need to keep Illinois moving forward. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Photo: Chicken dinners and Xmas shopping
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=869%2E135344%2ET6Uuwa)

Hey there,
It’s officially that time of year – the lights are up, the sales have started, and the holiday season is in full swing. Earlier this week, my team and I visited a Michigan staple – Frankenmuth, a Bavarian-inspired town and the state’s largest Christmas store – where the holiday season happens all year round. We, of course, also had to stop for a famous chicken dinner at Bavarian Inn and got in a bit of shopping at Bronner’s (if you know, you know).
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231203-1-tt&t=2&akid=869%2E135344%2ET6Uuwa)
But with all the festivities, something else happens around this time of year: Our fundraising starts to slow down as people go offline for the holidays. It’s hard to believe, but when our next FEC fundraising report happens, it will be on December 31 – New Year’s Eve. And after that, 2024 will be in full swing. Our campaign will be scaling up in big ways – hiring a lot more staff, attending even more events in every corner of the state, and eventually airing TV and digital ads across the state.
But before all of that can happen, we have some very real goals left to meet in 2023. To kick off the election year in the strongest possible way, we need to have a strong December ahead of our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year.
[**So if you’re starting to feel the holiday spirit, we’d love your help now to help us manage the holiday dip in fundraising in the last few weeks of the year. And your contribution of $3 will help us make the strategic decisions we need to kick off 2024 strong!**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231203-1-tt&t=3&akid=869%2E135344%2ET6Uuwa)

Peter,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Peter.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? clean_body: Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you’re satisfied with the job we’re doing. | | Peter, Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority. We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration." The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority. The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Peter. From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption. Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. -Grade the Republican Majority- Thank you, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:
Everyone deserves a living wage! Sign your name to demand an end to the subminimum wage >>
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74494379/441788605/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DC_231201_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YWZkNzNhLWZlOTEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OHdUcJqJn-vMm609_ApZX9lCkLY-hjzTKz_N_KFvTw8=)
Peter,
**In 2022, Americans voted in record numbers, staving off the pundit-predicted “red wave.” And this year, we did the same in local and statewide elections, seeing big wins from Virginia to Pennsylvania.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74494381/441788606/1859225569?refcode=UTS_EN_90DC_231201_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YWZkNzNhLWZlOTEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OHdUcJqJn-vMm609_ApZX9lCkLY-hjzTKz_N_KFvTw8=&emci=96d5c57d-c88f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=b8afd73a-fe91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=24268976)
With the 2024 election looming and right-wing attacks against our freedoms unrelenting, curbing impediments to voting — _like actually getting registered_ — is critical to ensuring we can protect our communities at the ballot box.
The simplest, easiest way to do that is to make it automatic nationwide. It should be simple, accessible, and fast to register, without difficult red-tape that suppresses minority voices.
[_**Add your name: let's make automatic voter registration available nationwide!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74494382/441788607/1859225569?refcode=UTS_EN_90DC_231201_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YWZkNzNhLWZlOTEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OHdUcJqJn-vMm609_ApZX9lCkLY-hjzTKz_N_KFvTw8=&emci=96d5c57d-c88f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=b8afd73a-fe91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=24268976)

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Celebrate the Holidays with the Notorious RBG!
body:
While it’s important that we’re all focused on protecting our democracy, it’s also important that your holiday gift list is complete.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74499916/441793890/1392300088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkMDgzOTkxLTAxOTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oIOoPy0U3tsfvVgdQd8kLrsB1CulA7dpDKr8c_hnm1I=)
---
| | Friend, While it’s important that we’re all focused on protecting our democracy, it’s also important that your holiday gift list is complete. There’s no better way to do that than by honoring one of our country’s biggest champions of democracy, Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Justice Ginsburg was a strong advocate for a functional democracy and worked to ensure that all citizens had equal protection under the law. She was instrumental in protecting equal rights for women and the LGBTQ+ community, illustrated by her support in _Roe v. Wade_ and _Obergefell v. Hodges_. The legacy of RBG can be seen in the recent win for abortion rights in Ohio and in the election of pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot. [**Join us in celebrating the work of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg this holiday season and make the day of the advocates and champions in your life by making a contribution of $19.99 or $29.99 and we’ll send you an RBG T-shirt or pair of RBG socks as an appreciation gift. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74499917/441793891/255829009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkMDgzOTkxLTAxOTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oIOoPy0U3tsfvVgdQd8kLrsB1CulA7dpDKr8c_hnm1I=#) The advocates in your life will be thrilled to show their support for one of democracy’s biggest champions and you can feel good knowing that your contribution is going to support our work to protect the freedom to vote. This holiday deal won’t last for long, so make your contribution today to receive your RBG t-shirt or socks!
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MY IMPORTANT SPEECH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
“A righteous crusade to liberate our Republic”| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=f48f1ad6b5fc40ed912d066dcdab0818&_e=WSOx3gR0OZ8gSFt4tvyCd4fYDk6yA99yQR7Do87ComKd76VB2tGtCbcpq0KeH3ZMOynhr5b0Z-25TsFVr8rkPj6SwkWNZTUKvdp8pOJirs3EhPkr57lUi27QM6jh1MmeQIgEn7DJDq4Ey4SyW0HAywqRSOdZBRmnFaDzQ4ZI5MGNV7ns6RazmplSdyLpGfZwzmGvRGZ822-8g_ReuGRBSsKfYkvemY61LQj9k2ZZsiTAvr16iF0TJKVd-kFq0unQ51GL7-H061zBN0cWkYI4oIH3ixy6KF9nAKbS1s8oxDoS-4UDFgJ0AibYxuLxYtgqqvwKCCq0q_52DH3zVM_MiQOSVAei77leCQqVn9N7CbMnW2tbk13_WoAoWegpmqH-QTdRdw9QIosoHjt0pcUqJOeASPEoJCnp-_PbGrloVuqih-ZFvmW-m6RrCEQyvrpu8AXyq-Ya-LcGOeQW9gP75EZpNee4HmEf_qfcBHCD5esNpIhG0biMoFWJgVY5fCMd)
---
| | Patriot,

---
Over the past few years, we’ve all heard that “American democracy is dying.”
---
During my speech in Iowa yesterday, I made it clear that there is no greater threat to our nation’s democracy than Crooked Joe Biden and the Democrats.
---
**We are witnessing a sitting president weaponize the entire legal system to try and steal an election and imprison his leading opponent despite committing NO CRIME.**
---
Biden isn’t just threatening American democracy. He’s _killing_ it.
---
Our campaign is a righteous crusade to liberate our Republic from Biden.
---
For decades, you watched as a corrupt political class in our nation’s capital looted your money, trampled your dignity, and pushed their radical agenda into every aspect of your lives.
---
In 2016, you voted to stand up to those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps – and you elected an outsider as president to put America FIRST.
---
But now, those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps lurking within the depths of the Washington Swamp are revolting against our America First movement by trying to imprison the only man who can stop them.
---
I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be over, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.
---

clean_body: “A righteous crusade to liberate our Republic”| | | | | Patriot, Over the past few years, we’ve all heard that “American democracy is dying.” During my speech in Iowa yesterday, I made it clear that there is no greater threat to our nation’s democracy than Crooked Joe Biden and the Democrats. We are witnessing a sitting president weaponize the entire legal system to try and steal an election and imprison his leading opponent despite committing NO CRIME. Biden isn’t just threatening American democracy. He’s killing it. Our campaign is a righteous crusade to liberate our Republic from Biden. For decades, you watched as a corrupt political class in our nation’s capital looted your money, trampled your dignity, and pushed their radical agenda into every aspect of your lives. In 2016, you voted to stand up to those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps – and you elected an outsider as president to put America FIRST. But now, those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps lurking within the depths of the Washington Swamp are revolting against our America First movement by trying to imprison the only man who can stop them. I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be over, and America will be a FREE NATION once again. In 43 DAYS, the first vote of the entire 2024 election will be cast. It will be our first chance to take a stand against tyranny and peacefully defend our Republic. With nearly 6 weeks left, I am humbly asking you to make a contribution of any amount you can to ensure we WIN the January 15th Iowa Caucus so that we can wrap up the primary and focus on the real mission:LIBERATING our Republic from Joe Biden. | | - Thank you, Donald J. Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan the Democratic candidate running to replace George Santos.
Believe it or not, George Santos was officially EXPELLED from the House of Representatives, becoming the sixth ever Congressmember in U.S. History to be ousted by his colleagues.
Now, we have 80 days until the special election to REPLACE Santos in Congress and secure a Democratic majority in the House.
I’m a Democrat, a mother of two, a Jewish religious refugee, and a former two-term NY State Senator. And I know a thing or two about flipping districts from red to blue.
That’s why I’ve just set an emergency goal of raising $50,000 to help me send a message to the GOP in Washington that this is a BLUE district.

Anna Kaplan

clean_body: Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan the Democratic candidate running to replace George Santos. Believe it or not, George Santos was officially EXPELLED from the House of Representatives, becoming the sixth ever Congressmember in U.S. History to be ousted by his colleagues. Now, we have 80 days until the special election to REPLACE Santos in Congress and secure a Democratic majority in the House. I’m a Democrat, a mother of two, a Jewish religious refugee, and a former two-term NY State Senator. And I know a thing or two about flipping districts from red to blue. That’s why I’ve just set an emergency goal of raising $50,000 to help me send a message to the GOP in Washington that this is a BLUE district. Will you help me win the special election to replace Santos in 80 days by splitting a donation of $20 or more between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez right now? [] Thank you, Anna Kaplan P.S. If you want to learn more about my race, please watch this important video, and consider pitching in a few bucks to help me spread the word: [] Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? body:
Democrats are in trouble - every single poll that I’ve seen/conducted recently shows support for Biden and his allies in Congress is CRATERING.| | | Peter, It’s Kellyanne Conway reaching out to have a frank discussion with you ahead of the pivotal 2024 general election. Believe it or not, we are less than one year until voters head to the polls to help save our nation and get this country back on track. So much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. The cost of living and crime have increased, while if you feel like we’re living in a time warp and Election Day 2020 just came to an end, believe me, you’re not alone. While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same.
1. Americans _still_ want lower taxes.
2. Americans are _still fighting_ for safer communities in which to raise their families.
3. And Americans simply want enough cash in their bank accounts to pay their bills and have a little fun.

Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called “ _leadership”_ of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage. **[That’s why I am writing to you in support of Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy, the leading candidate to replace failed D.C. insider Jon Tester.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9da537144e486f8ac4a2916b9e5e26&_e=teT6Dukz8kQzdTlPR7Nvs3sHgL8EAEGAGCpBswhntYpaCRXCsi_vTk8y0uL71x2g3eNOpXUE9V863n06shKVsxw6AeJrARNCISm01MM15CXnuXTkw4TBDPT1QQu79_Q-SzvrWZgUt2ZRk-z5JuF0iQFdSLCZkGaO4zwbNrCcGWwV_JSzwEN25LrJ0Y82Wc5tjJ5liLRoEONr_p6zbWDYssyLSzOunllTlVeVXq3nTYQWFpZLKHJkvuJcWNh5dvTaiOqz-rQng84GGdGso2gL8aDFwn43_XyWtfTubOvXN5hHTE8utwwvt5uf5JGXBHGAOshcYSeiq0dI-acNpKkQy1p0lGsHXBfZ2Z7xSE1N_rmwQOqIqPcD6HVKyP0ReWmGuzASix-Iud4f45nGFgngQqT1vy7ivHjrehkl8DByLaFP73SmnP6C7EPdwwXuyeBbA56sBHdTDYMrx0xs4uPx1g%3D%3D)** The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bona fide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders. I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: **[Tim is our best shot at beating Jon Tester and flipping the Senate majority, yet his fundraising numbers are lower than they ought to be, while Biden-supporting Democrat and phony Jon Tester has a massive warchest.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9da537144e486f8ac4a2916b9e5e26&_e=teT6Dukz8kQzdTlPR7Nvs3sHgL8EAEGAGCpBswhntYpaCRXCsi_vTk8y0uL71x2g3eNOpXUE9V863n06shKVsxw6AeJrARNCISm01MM15CXnuXTkw4TBDPT1QQu79_Q-SzvrWZgUt2ZRk-z5JuF0iQFdSLCZkGaO4zwbNrCcGWwV_JSzwEN25LrJ0Y82Wc5tjJ5liLRoEONr_p6zbWDYssyLSzOunllTlVeVXq3nTYQWFpZLKHJkvuJcWNh5dvTaiOqz-rQng84GGdGso2gL8aDFwn43_XyWtfTubOvXN5hHTE8utwwvt5uf5JGXBHGACqO3Gmehmn8kb4l2K6Mub4_5YBExErApqsDjTZC6mynbfED5xP64eXDR1gSGyM4xrDgIpBL-JUEjbVBEduxXJFYGqNm2sWS7C5aFKxqsKccBdw9PwodjQW6aSCLhIHgTmqeJNIEExvDY4U5UqYD0Pg%3D%3D)** You could say that I know a thing or two about polling - and _**[polling shows that with adequate resources, Tim can defeat Jon Tester and flip a Senate seat Republicans have been chasing after since 2006.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9da537144e486f8ac4a2916b9e5e26&_e=teT6Dukz8kQzdTlPR7Nvs3sHgL8EAEGAGCpBswhntYpaCRXCsi_vTk8y0uL71x2g3eNOpXUE9V863n06shKVsxw6AeJrARNCISm01MM15CXnuXTkw4TBDPT1QQu79_Q-SzvrWZgUt2ZRk-z5JuF0iQFdSLCZkGaO4zwbNrCcGWwV_JSzwEN25LrJ0Y82Wc5tjJ5liLRoEONr_p6zbWDYssyLSzOunllTlVeVXq3nTYQWFpZLKHJkvuJcWNh5dvTaiOqz-rQng84GGdGso2gL8aDFwn43_XyWtfTubOvXN5hHTE8utwwvt5uf5JGXBHGAUZNC-EM027bGX6py26znNDWNLDbVvr3MxJfzdXnG_xVXXgYFiolp0NvqBR9u3B8PXuRZw4V7JSuw9LRvEF5aMsgEvXYLxKauAI8NOtGuQzL_eFWakIXddUuGTXj40e_b58yonROdKMc2OcG70bUUmA%3D%3D)**_

While so much has changed under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the cost of living and crime have increased, so much has stayed the same. 1. Americans still want lower taxes. 2. Americans are still fighting for safer communities in which to raise their families. 3. And Americans simply want enough cash in their bank accounts to pay their bills and have a little fun. Under President Trump and Republican leadership in Congress, the voting public was more confident in their ability to live out their American Dream. But under the so-called “ leadership” of President Biden and Montana U.S. Sen. Jon Tester, Americans are frustrated and fed up with the lackluster economy and weakness on the world stage. The contrast between these two individuals is clear: one is a bona fide American hero, while the other has made a living doing the bidding of Democrat party elders. I know that Tim has been reaching out to you for months. I also know that some of my friends in the U.S. Senate have been reaching out to you, too. But I want to make sure you hear it from me: You could say that I know a thing or two about polling - and Right now, it’s time to channel our frustrations into defeating the DEMS at the ballot box next November. And I’m not just talking about Joe Biden and Kamala Harris - I’m talking about all Democrats, namely fake “moderate” Jon Tester. Chuck Grassley emailed you.Marco Rubio emailed you.Marsha Blackburn emailed you.Steve Daines emailed you. and ensure our candidates have the resources we need to defeat the Leftist agenda, Biden and his allies. Let’s get it done.God bless you.Kellyanne Conway | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
