Fellow American, Hunter Biden is refusing to submit to a deposition in front of my committee for one simple reason: he thinks he gets to dictate the terms of a subpoena because he's the President's son. I have news for Hunter and the entire Biden Crime Family; **that 's not going to fly with me.** I don't care what their last name is, nobody is above the law. _**Hunter and every other Biden family member who receives a lawful subpoena from me will comply with my investigation.**_ The Biden family lawyers are desperate to have their Democrat lackeys on the Oversight Committee run interference as my Republican colleagues and I ask the pressing questions that will expose Joe Biden's role as head of the Biden Crime Family. Without proven liars Jamie Raskin and Dan Goldman grandstanding for the camera's, Hunter's sworn testimony, which I will publicly release, will lay bare the influence peddling and widespread cover-up perpetrated by the Biden family. **That 's why the Biden's are fighting harder than ever to keep their sprawling criminal enterprise from blowing up in their faces. Which means we must fight back harder than ever, too.** They've even had shady out-of-town opposition researchers in my hometown digging into every business record and acre of land I've ever owned to smear me and my family. Not once has my courage wavered in my pursuit of exposing the truth about the Biden Crime Family, and I know you're counting on me to remain steadfast in my resolve. body:
There’s been a theme in Congress this year

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74506790/441798950/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2I1OWFjMi0wNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9uCcIuLasEd3wWrfp1byYb-5gCNuedi5qxvlJ18w3E=)

Peter, there’s been a theme this year: Time and time again, Democrats have stepped up to get the job done when the Republican _majority_ couldn’t.

✔️ **We stepped up and cast the critical votes to keep the government open.

✔️ We stepped up and prevented a catastrophic default.

✔️ We stepped up and accomplished what the Republican majority couldn’t.**

Despite being in the minority, we were the ones who _actually_ governed. **_Think about how much we could accomplish if we took back the House, Peter._**

**[I’m hopeful for 2024 — but I need you to be, too. If you’re with me in the fight to take back the House and stop the Republican chaos, will you chip in $3 to join me in this must-win fight? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74506794/441798951/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231203_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2I1OWFjMi0wNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9uCcIuLasEd3wWrfp1byYb-5gCNuedi5qxvlJ18w3E=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74506814/441798958/-1359812268?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20231203_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2I1OWFjMi0wNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9uCcIuLasEd3wWrfp1byYb-5gCNuedi5qxvlJ18w3E=)

Fellow American,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you're satisfied with the job we're doing._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3639a6fb232e4dd7abe7123c66b69913&_e=tWm-O81OmxHFlcc0lJvsXVbPmnsxFYcrFexNY0dIrO--UgiBCnjdHhHffBqCMSDuZiEfw5YPeU1floMz8a5P1QMcKy198ZZiDYzyZb00twhCVs-h5FEn6XEUkIRgmzsQHykfeSEID0BZo4rR_XRuvLwebGxE2juL8mrrl0u9uVxDBtAQqJYO0Akdu9YDYnChnZBt41fwFraU7FmlM4jn4TztjXlFRgsMaVL3IM51gbmd0epeWcQllgzVlLN29kCYV8QVQ-ZmZnfjitNz8Wd77Ppl0_5gJCY7VcQwyTCRGfbOSm5j5hU-L3HOLIVG0K0X1R54Be0VkQp5Ff8XSZKvSte2SJ60At2b4u33bqkTGw6IHwVwIGiILhqj_giAzpDtMB8UjYoclIoisL1ED5VMfw%3D%3D)

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

**[MSNBC: "Speaker Mike Johnson could help put Donald Trump back in the White name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

I am so grateful for our police officers.

As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and
justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect
our communities.

Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing
our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that
we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling
criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the
police."

I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator
of our society and that the black community must fight and scream
and demand support for the people in our community who are up to
no good.

That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization
focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as
educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs
and acts of community service.

Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local
officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those
who serve our communities.

To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please
sign the national petition today.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the
Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the
city's police force.

The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit
to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with
thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's
appreciation.

If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local
heroes - please sign the national petition right away.

While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think
minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of
black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same
or even increase.

We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those
lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country
as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every
day.

We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities
and demeaning police around the nation.

If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you
should want law and you should want order. That is the way
forward.

Join me in letting our police officers know that you support
law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our
communities safe.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Candace Owens

Chair of BLEXIT

Powered by Turning Point USA

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

You were added to the system July 13, 2023.

_A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. body:

Fellow American,

Nikki Haley is wrong for America. She is Dick Cheney 2.0 and dangerous for America. I can’t believe some of the things she is saying:

* Nikki wants to ban ALL anonymous social media accounts _(I can think of a few formerly anonymous writers who would become the founders of our great country who disagree)._

* Haley is pro-war, pushing for more and more involvement in Ukraine and foreign conflict abroad. No surprise since she cashed in millions of dollars after serving on the board of Boeing.

* And now, Nikki Haley is jumping on the identity politics bandwagon, claiming that she is above criticism because she is a woman running in the Republican primary.

| [** NO TO NEOCONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ad772f5b8c914706a0eb0502ff461c4f&_e=w49kKz1G-xwWMtpenwDmoX-W8tZnR1yTR0-my9TnOnr1CWpfY8a9h_5-7FAXOc9FYj56oCtika3hDRZEH2MsWeN7gVgvDYQ6_-rewjXM_VPX81sntLpOz5H910z4ycAazw8TuR-N1G4fSSetjpgY___mf1HiLn5eCYMhzeqrcTCUFwNVFHPho2FvaO1UHBMbDb1nASg5zisPmO9pmqnPtYWULn1UGWiBU6tyyRehmZJia-MYCfi1Bo0n5JhfhsagegvN1oeFcDY60ajc0UjbOKU4Bug6RWuqMVRjKbLJWW6OuHEFsl2R7eQZ__4LKNS1hZ_mpj1RIVS-TdtssJGrCrzOyDfJgz5fWI2U07ISUNANksznjZCQV2w1qXYGiLewVU_WguWkv7XR0SMExKdruw%3D%3D)
---

America funding the war on Ukraine is a huge mistake that will add to our already massive national debt. And identity politics will take us nowhere in life, definitely not to the White House.

As a father, my moral obligation is to my sons. As President, my _sole_ obligation is to the citizens of our nation. Here’s my foreign policy in a nutshell:

**1\. Avoid World War III
2\. Declare independence from Communist China
3\. Defend the American homeland
**

[**Fellow American, if you believe protecting American interests starts with securing our own country first, I need you on my team.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ad772f5b8c914706a0eb0502ff461c4f&_e=w49kKz1G-xwWMtpenwDmoX-W8tZnR1yTR0-my9TnOnr1CWpfY8a9h_5-7FAXOc9FYj56oCtika3hDRZEH2MsWeN7gVgvDYQ6_-rewjXM_VPX81sntLpOz5H910z4ycAazw8TuR-N1G4fSSetjpgY___mf1HiLn5eCYMhzeqrcTCUFwNVFHPho2FvaO1UHBMbDb1nASg5zisPmO9pmqnPtYWULn1UGWiBU6tyyRehmZJia-MYCfi1Bo0n5JhfhsagSRdrv8bj8wfWNxYtXd18uK_J8apgAZDslNyy3B9DGYjy19GJbN5I3OnLjKn8TfaLvMaTmZFDY6AHgEUXArPz3p5ovtcHiNq0MV0HKJcnzNSuvONVdM60WCGhdTZw9o2PMLqFGu4xlopC5Ffv65vXAg%3D%3D)

_**This campaign is about the future.**_ This campaign is not about looking back on the past and the policies of 20 years ago. We need a modern approach, a Republican who leads our current party and motivates the most voters possible.

That candidate will not come from the neocon wing of the past or those who want to play brinksmanship with American lives. I stand with the American people looking toward a brighter future for our country.

_Fellow American, can I count on you in this fight?_ Neocon ideology cost the US trillions and killed millions in pointless wars that didn’t advance our interests. [**Peace can be obtained, it’s not naive to want to make a better world through America First 2.0 policies. Stand with me today.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ad772f5b8c914706a0eb0502ff461c4f&_e=w49kKz1G-xwWMtpenwDmoX-W8tZnR1yTR0-my9TnOnr1CWpfY8a9h_5-7FAXOc9FYj56oCtika3hDRZEH2MsWeN7gVgvDYQ6_-rewjXM_VPX81sntLpOz5H910z4ycAazw8TuR-N1G4fSSetjpgY___mf1HiLn5eCYMhzeqrcTCUFwNVFHPho2FvaO1UHBMbDb1nASg5zisPmO9pmqnPtYWULn1UGWiBU6tyyRehmZJia-MYCfi1Bo0n5Jhfhsag9p-TQ8CzlKQV_YElgVQjcshLVsXq5tsTD4Xp9t-UGBoHqd1MXDfoT1tVWUZfgXbiadZf_EPjk40bOhDdQgBLG3FbHfEkMIzxPlQB_REBxaLIFHOPvQqWx1sCR9fpQvPxSny7Ys24We32UTWA4Qu4lg%3D%3D)

In **TRUTH** ,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ad772f5b8c914706a0eb0502ff461c4f&_e=w49kKz1G-xwWMtpenwDmoX-W8tZnR1yTR0-my9TnOnr1CWpfY8a9h_5-7FAXOc9FYj56oCtika3hDRZEH2MsWeN7gVgvDYQ6_-rewjXM_VPX81sntLpOz5H910z4ycAazw8TuR-N1G4fSSetjpgY___mf1HiLn5eCYMhzeqrcTCUFwNVFHPho2FvaO1UHBMbDb1nASg5zisPmO9pmqnPtYWULn1UGWiBU6tyyRehmZJia-MYCfi1Bo0n5JhfhsagrD3B2y_Jxdv19RiFixyEcTIkVJD86GRRx3LMGb4Pt6M6SIZKDQsvKuKKHsWsNr-j_0juemHO-w3rrPVFdzN-tTqGag54OedsixPfCODBF_7-Ggq1deBZrIKJp8uoApCTNW741MVnEXmUQWHHhRnM3Q%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** NO TO NEOCONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ad772f5b8c914706a0eb0502ff461c4f&_e=w49kKz1G-xwWMtpenwDmoX-W8tZnR1yTR0-my9TnOnr1CWpfY8a9h_5-7FAXOc9FYj56oCtika3hDRZEH2MsWeN7gVgvDYQ6_-rewjXM_VPX81sntLpOz5H910z4ycAazw8TuR-N1G4fSSetjpgY___mf1HiLn5eCYMhzeqrcTCUFwNVFHPho2FvaO1UHBMbDb1nASg5zisPmO9pmqnPtYWULn1UGWiBU6tyyRehmZJia-MYCfi1Bo0n5JhfhsagJCh-Hn5SS9_LqBXkJXvEKfCbfLwW4PhgJwI974-aORL_1o9Tma66ZsPGuc0D4MC1yOB1TLZ2wIlHmMwhfedy0NC58tUAoWvrUIZWdQvJyrvmaUoMo-vfXeLaYTZR-QlvO2_D5-wocT8tF32UAb-whA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change

body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=Hh%2B1WUrKd5RorwmahOuAXRzzftbWVKSDeeumWyzF2qecfd5aNahx7xZUUiykpsJbesJVNnL3j7OjYIu%2BskWjgPDsRdh0YE3br6epcP6DX6r%2FwEy1aSVbCErGB7rAOzj%2BtbCDWFFioX7R2brZy8qqA1W4pej%2F5VGDCFn%2FTg0YzVzHUvUzd35mq3JNakAYKswZRyAt8JPMqM4o4rkJ2qbiEAcUpwjHqztSKmf5DpGUOohaZQCso2q3xKGrhyqFiLyXAwK23xTl6et14P%2BC61nLLEFuj%2FaOfMU95rrJfhNoOx0NUAuDUDpF9BraDFGoNUMbB8aNRh1z4xUKdS7o0SB3zOlUoXSUHbffstDzvSSwJ2F40NckX4JFQNTmdHaDa%2Fs3kQ9CwvzjcJZTVEeMRtH9oItycLQvchQTu7TGr05LFhpGHT%2FEv2i0lVS35eYwFSAc .

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)
Peter, we'll be straightforward.
We're building a team across PA to hold this seat, re-elect Bob Casey, and make sure we defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.
**[Can you help power our campaign with a grassroots contribution of $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1&refcode2=1270_552475_rzDO9h&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1&refcode2=1270_552475_rzDO9h&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)**
We're running against David McCormick, a mega-millionaire who can easily self-fund his campaign. Together with Mitch McConnell and dark money GOP donors, he's trying to buy PA's Senate seat.
**[To stop them, we need the help of grassroots supporters like you-- so can you help us compete by chipping in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1&refcode2=1270_552475_rzDO9h&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1&refcode2=1270_552475_rzDO9h&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)**
The stakes are high, and Pennsylvania is key to the GOP's plan to take back both the Senate and the White House. _CNN_ has upgraded our ranking to the #4 most competitive Senate seat in the country. The only way we'll keep Bob fighting for Pennsylvania families in the Senate is with your help.
**[We need to fight back, and to do that we'll need you, Peter. Rush a contribution today so we have the resources we need to re-elect Bob.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1&refcode2=1270_552475_rzDO9h&akid=1270%2E552475%2ErzDO9h)**

Thank you for all you do for this team.
Together,
Bob Casey for Senate

Here's the truth: | | |

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: December is a crucial month for our campaign. Everyone will be watching: the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be wanting to see the strength of our movement. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand millions and millions of Republican attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because December is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election -- the final year-end deadline of the campaign. Because December is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election -- the final year-end deadline of the campaign. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot to our chances. Team Joe

subject: Quick message before I head onstage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Hi team! Please excuse any typos – I’m writing this before I head onstage
for the “Together We Thrive” Senate Candidate Forum, hosted by the Latino
Democrats of Prince George’s County.

It’s truly an honor to be invited to speak today, and to make my case for
why I’m the best candidate to represent Maryland in the Senate. Open
forums like these help voters make informed decisions at the ballot box –
that’s democracy in action.

For those of you in attendance, I can’t wait to see your smiling faces!
And to every member of this awesome team, thank you, thank you, thank you
for your support. I hope I’ll make you proud today.

Quickly: Will you consider pitching in $10 or $20 to give our campaign a
boost before I take the stage? If you’re able to donate, you can use this
secure, personal link:

Wish me luck!

– Angela

THE CORRUPT KANGAROO COURT

|
---
Patriot,

**$200,000 PRICE FOR FREEDOM**
| [**SUPPORT MAGA -> 50X IMPACT** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0ac8fb7b0f374084a9f72e8a51cd988f&_e=6tcYU2gqXTHuBw8PHPY22_C55m1PU3ytABbDVsYoONl13zq-CffsQHc0IQ8zkQ_vdCo40zPvk4R0Pa8ZtepG2IPsonY8GNBY8_E1PwzWKhUM2H578z1YMytHsS9M7ptF_WDubPmcDvdFVn3ZzDZYmD-MwUjms2IdjkjUfPcMJZdq4QsKKSG7wDu6B8vzAEEZCcfxIT1FXQiD-5iZPdClG1qcww_xSLjwmCjQauYhEhXsrHmIMOqp1t0umH9_Ui2xubMCDG_lEkZqlLG06doyYo-M16VryGH0TjvGahunhVlNXR7MCnYg0R-gLY2BZKo4AoHm2P-XZuC4zDxilX-DG2e9sBJYYgTfnfrGya9H3sXUyUSveeTFlE7LjJMgAIArQ0UkPapstEuX4dhCR6120A%3D%3D)

**RADICAL LEFT PROSECUTORS ACROSS THE COUNTRY HAVE SET THE PRICE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP 'S FREEDOM...**
**The failing, Corrupt Deep State is leading bogus investigations against President Trump. NOW, they are demanding $200k FOR HIS FREEDOM!**

[**President Trump is in serious trouble -- we need EVERY MAGA PATRIOT to rush their support to fight back against the Deep State and help SAVE AMERICA.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0ac8fb7b0f374084a9f72e8a51cd988f&_e=6tcYU2gqXTHuBw8PHPY22_C55m1PU3ytABbDVsYoONl13zq-CffsQHc0IQ8zkQ_vdCo40zPvk4R0Pa8ZtepG2IPsonY8GNBY8_E1PwzWKhUM2H578z1YMytHsS9M7ptF_WDubPmcDvdFVn3ZzDZYmD-MwUjms2IdjkjUfPcMJZdq4QsKKSG7wDu6B8vzAEEZCcfxIT1FXQiD-5iZPdClG1qcww_xSLjwmCjQauYhEhXsrHmIMOqp1t0umH9_Ui2xDflqKoScvHFaAqvTa7p92CBigqnT1p2LVNePTEaVSZkvuNLvK0AuhpY_ABX2L_kvNKS8D_Mpt-NLCymg8GtFkiBmeOlmwCdAOEAJ5QCXQq93HOs_K_EtWy5hypPp1ZF-R0Qag0dXedAQLPZvtGHkdQ%3D%3D)

[**The bottom line is that President Trump is INNOCENT.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0ac8fb7b0f374084a9f72e8a51cd988f&_e=6tcYU2gqXTHuBw8PHPY22_C55m1PU3ytABbDVsYoONl13zq-CffsQHc0IQ8zkQ_vdCo40zPvk4R0Pa8ZtepG2IPsonY8GNBY8_E1PwzWKhUM2H578z1YMytHsS9M7ptF_WDubPmcDvdFVn3ZzDZYmD-MwUjms2IdjkjUfPcMJZdq4QsKKSG7wDu6B8vzAEEZCcfxIT1FXQiD-5iZPdClG1qcww_xSLjwmCjQauYhEhXsrHmIMOqp1t0umH9_Ui2xm9I9d4G1ubxToSPVpmLGrmg4zvnWriWF2jEaieZCcyI0Sgd-k86w2d5qyjhhr-xgz1rFphwuizYy1KOM_XhERsyiwPJSMkXesK-6Bvpj0YTq0W-9WMc76w-u94CPNwAh0SYlDxnvPOCOoiRmWDlgdg%3D%3D)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74513952/441807464/-1415976427?refcode=em-12.3.23-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJjNmI3NzEtMGU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YWOOMBNjFj_1SP5Ytxhgoj0G5oGaU_Sf_SkEm3RvmYE=) But Laura was also born in a year of civic action and people taking representation into their own hands. The National Organization for Women (NOW) was founded; transit workers walked off the job for better working conditions; the Civil Rights Movement was in full swing, with people across identities coming together to demand a seat at the table. It was in these settings that Laura developed her passion for equity and standing up for the community, knowing that we’re only as strong as our most marginalized voices. And now she wants to take that passion that has served our community to Washington, as the proven progressive fighter for CA-30. [**Let’s show Laura our support by giving a birthday donation. clean_body: | = Friend, It’s a special day for the campaign team. Today is Laura’s birthday,= 1966 was a groovy time. The Doors recorded their first album; the Dodgers made the World Series; Gene Roddenberry produced the first episodes of Star Trek; and we met the first televised Batman. = But Laura was also born in a year of civic action and people taking representation into their own hands. The National Organization for Women (NOW) was founded; transit workers walked off the job for better working conditions; the Civil Rights Movement was in full swing, with people across identities coming together to demand a seat at the table. It was in these settings that Laura developed her passion for equity and standing up for the community, knowing that we’re only as strong as our most marginalized voices. And now she wants to take that passion that has served our community to Washington, as the proven progressive fighter for CA-30. = Team Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Here’s why:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74514209/441808551/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=20.91&refcode=jtk1271-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY0ODBkYy0wZTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9MQcFKxB7RTXz0R01yiZZCMkFc4LNWLt6Mt5WXng4m0=)**
Ever since I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker _ever_ to be elected as New York's attorney general, I have fought tirelessly to bring a voice to the voiceless and put agency back in the hands of the people. And I'll be honest, Peter, my work has made me a _lot _of enemies.
After generations of politicians catering almost exclusively to the powerful and corrupt, my fight for progress, justice, and accountability was a cold shock to the most powerful forces in our nation – **and now, they're attempting to undermine me at _every _turn.**
Thanks to the grassroots support of people like Mary J. who donated $250, Arthur W. who donated $50, and Sheila H. and José G. who both donated $5, I have been able to withstand their attacks so far. But, as their attacks grow more pointed, I'm counting on _you_ to provide me with the resources I need to continue my fight.

She’s also a MAGA devotee who takes money from the NRA, wants to ban abortion, & votes to cut taxes for the rich while working folks make up the difference. This is Gloria Johnson 👇 = She’s running to DEFEAT Marsha Blackburn. She’s an advocate for women, kids, and working families. She’ll stand tall for our most fundamental rights. And she’s not afraid to piss ANYONE off to deliver real results for Tennessee. Gloria’s the leader we need working for us in the Senate, but Marsha won’t go down without a fight. Marsha has a massive campaign war chest and corporate PACs standing by to pour money into this race. It WON’T be easy to keep up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. clean_body: Don’t be fooled – the RINOs WANT to help Crooked Joe... | | | Friend, This week – when we’re forced to go to a State Supreme Court to fight to keep my name from being REMOVED from the 2024 ballot – our RINO opponents will be gathering for yet another little league debate. And sadly, this has become the trend for the most important election in our nation’s history... While Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats, like a Third World Dictatorship, are using all-out LEGAL WARFARE to try and stop (and JAIL!) their leading political opponent (me), our RINO opponents twiddle their thumbs, waste your time, and set fire to our Party’s resources attacking OUR movement instead of going after the single biggest Crook to ever occupy the White House. In fact, shadowy RINO megadonors just hatched a NEW plot behind closed doors to spend TENS OF MILLIONS MORE to stop us! These cowards would rather spend $400 MILLION in total against their own party’s undisputed FRONTRUNNER than spend a dime against Joe Biden. It’s an absolute disgrace! But I’m willing to bet that a patriot like YOU won’t stand for it, Friend. Which is why, if you’re not doing too poorly despite Crooked Joe’s disastrous policies, I’m asking that you consider making a contribution of any amount – truly, even just $1 – to help WRAP UP this primary right out of the gate with voting set to begin in just 43 DAYS. Together, we will lock up the nomination faster than any other candidate in HISTORY so that we can shift ALL our attention to the REAL mission: firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House! | | Thank you, | Donald J. **This Week in Review**
Peter,
With this weeks expulsion of Rep. George Santos, the 118th Congress enshrined their place in U.S. History.
No matter our (or their) personal opinions of Santos, one thing is for certain: this sets a precedence for the House of Representatives to expel members for being charged with crimes, but without due process.
To me this is just another example of the circus that we are all sick and tired of. Like always, when asked my opinion on Real America’s Voice Live, I had this to say:
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=6ce9925eb9&e=0426928d91)
Not to my surprise, my opinion wasn’t too far off from Steve Bannon who believes this is all by design from ex-House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, (R-Calif.) and other anti-Trump Republicans to hurt the America First Movement.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=0d0e328b7b&e=0426928d91)
This would **NOT** be the first time. Right here in my race Kevin has endorsed against me and is working hard to ensure that my “suit” of an opponent wins the GOP Primary.

Did you keep up with Chris Christie this week? In case you didn't, Chris made news when he announced he wouldn't sign a nationwide six-week abortion ban. The reasoning? Because the entire point of overturning Roe was to leave abortion to the states, not the federal government! Also, as a surprise to no one, Trump is MIA on the campaign trail as he slogs through legal drama. Chris knows Trump can't be our president, let alone a proper candidate. clean_body: | | = Continue reading below to learn why taking back the Democrat majority is critical. If you've been feeling like Republican leadership in the House is one big dumpster fire lately, you're not alone. = In just 163 days of the Congressional session, the American people have sat through: AT LEAST 4 near-physical altercations between House Republicans, = 19 rounds of voting for House Speaker, = 26 days with NO House Speaker, = AND... 3 Republican attempts to shut down our government over petty infighting. = The level of dysfunction coming from House Republicans would be laughable — if it wasn’t so damaging. Brian has had ENOUGH of Republican chaos standing in the way of safer, stronger, and healthier communities. It's time for Democrats to take back the House, and Dr. Williams is answering the call to serve. But he needs your help. To take back the House majority in 2024, Democrats need to gain five seats AND protect every blue seat they already have — including TX-32. name: Team Fetterman
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek,
**FIRST:** We worked together to beat the odds, flip PA blue 🔵, and elect John Fetterman.
**THEN:** John got to work in the Senate fighting for the working people of Pennsylvania. 💪
**NOW:** We're hoping to start December off as strong as possible so we can keep supporting John's work and fending off attacks from the far right.
**[John's counting on this team to keep up this work as we wrap up 2023 and enter the election year. Do you think you could chip in your first $5, $25, or whatever feels right today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1-8695&refcode2=8695_434096_Jw7qBg&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-8695&refcode2=8695_434096_Jw7qBg&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)**
Here's why supporting John's work is *so* important year-round, Derek.
As a father of three awesome kids, John understands all too well that our future generations are going to feel the effects of what our national + state governments do today.
On so many issues, from abortion, to education, to health care, to climate, **our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.**
John's in the Senate fighting for you + your family just the same way he'd fight for his own. **That's honestly what we all deserve from our Senators.**
**[If you agree, we respectfully ask that you make your first donation of 2023. This is people-powered work, and we can only get it done if we all pitch in.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231203-1?refcode=em20231203-1-8695&refcode2=8695_434096_Jw7qBg&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231203-8695-footer&t=1&refcode2=8695_434096_Jw7qBg&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8695%2E434096%2EJw7qBg)

Fellow American,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you're satisfied with the job we're doing._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5a922db07a1e46d0a84af127711f1aee&_e=Pa7EMKIGlro_HuUfUtnCH_lJtmXagnd-MKOZbeRTMafKQz82Z3JuRkXqR80dwGNsDlvLUR7oXlt1NBzInoC7Fkaso3rG1u_M1RLEy91KmEmPVNlNTEemUe_GTgFSexitG1LpPR7XYBhIjtMPP0f50_BGQAYEnYel2zLmQcvQqVdZHutezJ11O2nAc_E-x4kTt9YR-xuvcRPnu0wfuvl99ALFM24YuT_Sqg1JAx67nm967PiDZBP0u0yicrw66pOuv9WgF-MN1P53NnZi0qs3OHzbocdbog8AgRZi4EyG_gsKOQ3B_hqYB39HshBK0zNKfngZ-t5fvehu_vRc1dVW0BWGzBPzh8nty8VDAybQbSX5SdKpRNgwY4lwiD22tcDmM_7gVaj6lRS5Lbl8P8CQHA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Almost one year into the Majority, we’re curious to know how you think we’re doing. | | Fellow American, Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority. We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration." The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority. The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American. From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption. Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. -Grade the Republican Majority- Thank you, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:
This week, Congress passed resolutions that dehumanize Palestinians, contributing to violence and erasure. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvi2lwrEEls2LR71Js0CVKCU-GJRsg55ytc6mSrY-Wmr02HgTdrp1iR19pqZTZPelQ60sAnr2PtM3M-VS_-LXy6o-M-ymJAQ9-rkiI9dLQbb7Yc1NiS2sPfZv0TFMr_dw8fuwLpEUuwWc5eZrCxOPaSIlH4MseuwyfNgLf-E4Pa2PhRDh79xEmiMGwPewTtWDYl4oz_SUd1ANW03mzCgR5euJEobIFGCH_H2iCREzvYR3TPvfaMtaFmf6ZrgrWYmwfTzuW4iqOl9XnJicD8XM2lV2d9-bqf831591UgOp7ZkKECS-3ecBPp-T1asQHdRRh2xo0WeOHtMAZSLljhoMsUw/41t/j6q9kdHyTtWreYo7IFXLpQ/h0/x8eBHAIH6x1JHeTuvEyyco94MAY5_OHvjEKQygn-VUg)

Friend, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans have been feeling betrayed by our government. This past week, Israel began bombing Gaza again after the temporary truce expired. Instead of demanding a permanent ceasefire, Congress passed multiple resolutions that continue to devalue Palestinians and support Israel’s government while it commits genocide with U.S. tax dollars and American-made weapons. The dehumanizing rhetoric from the media and government leaders is fueling anti-Palestinian hate crimes and endangering Muslims and Arabs around the world, including in the United States. We must speak out not only against the violence, but also to recognize Palestinians’ humanity. **Thankfully, our movement demanding a ceasefire is growing.** On Friday, the United Auto Workers Union became the largest union in the U.S. to join our calls for a ceasefire, joining the American Postal Workers Union, which combined represent 600,000 workers across the country. [**Please add your name if you agree: As Congress attempts to rewrite history and ignore the existence of the Palestinian people, we must speak out and affirm that Palestinians exist and will not be erased.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKus1MLbJ72C3fd7DC309oWU3KjLNq9ipZ64DA8jyPAXRS-BSKHvRLoAe4m3UCZQxzN5hrpAhixspYgWAqBMhlDsrxcX88G-QTUUxCFdFGg3Hg77QPliZ7SM2qskcL28GEBwB-Zur4UY_j3pL9Z2VCYyEQeFXnnOnIwW4K5r__YEBXWPvo24RUWo8WquE041sKmYH8pgimWy_C8e4kYwIjKLA0rEH1wwflTgiB3512shOacrELEpGwcsVZ8XoBfqxo4QwMRJc5AIti-D_HldOI6T5ZeUOxOr824FyxsSB5ih2owg7URe_8G17FUsHdRCUmZz43stx4EA7bDz5wNYh7ua2we_2VTHG2ZJi9vnfnw6zWovDexFED3jjiGHOOOfl_Fxg0e7xIvz7l7622DQ-J5DNj0nAM5YPHGUMdviwKmlFEiN5BtswKQ7uA5VWHVt_D95gwgPqOHJzb3dfTynBxp4l1s557hOg350YwWvKkseiHxgXlwi-6m_Su5stHgnIeN/41t/j6q9kdHyTtWreYo7IFXLpQ/h1/JlVWKbLLMGkNgb_FNpt6YwH5FnpfJAaRXZCzF9RnguI) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKus1MLbJ72C3fd7DC309oWU3KjLNq9ipZ64DA8jyPAXRS-BSKHvRLoAe4m3UCZQxzN5hrpAhixspYgWAqBMhlDsrxcX88G-QTUUxCFdFGg3HgDVSHeb1YEP-_QNlLk9i702N8uj-IFDSEDrVImP11f2620SD-CtX60krvZq0fEy_cPOOgKepneDj2zTPZNnO2x5C11Wvvq4UebMDXKukiAH5CO9t2-eJe_LG2lmzS72wBl1UGZM8DHxxILMxQnJ01qnBTYIQfSRvwjNJ7IlzjQUZFh_prasXk6ytqLUhr---KOnSi744tC4rkFjheJf7OCVrTsKcvqfqhEqmSw8NS_NiwfU7qICnKpPK7XZaioiLAAKNmjn9KVSsL6mU-7zPwyxoN4TSrJZ33HDBzmrMBD0ov9FZPE3QAvAEaNsyyAu5EXR_Z403Jg9JfxO2uAnr9bQb9dhryz0wL9xPl2bRLV8s5oqW5PM4nCLVUOeItjBwABWjRU8CwXWCRhhHcWOzAx/41t/j6q9kdHyTtWreYo7IFXLpQ/h2/17pGnufHbFo45tc3noNVBCKjW9CmQgWm4QvUEFNZmlQ)
---
Too many of my colleagues in Congress refuse to view Palestinians as equal human beings who deserve the same rights, freedom, and human dignity as Israelis. They refuse to call for a permanent ceasefire, or for the release of Palestinian civilians being held by Israeli forces without charge or trial.
I keep wondering: How many more lives will be enough? How many more children need to be killed? How many more families have to be traumatized and torn apart, before our government’s leaders call for a permanent ceasefire?
Thank you for calling for a true ceasefire, and for recognizing that Palestinians are not disposable.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Friend,
Israel’s military has resumed its bombing of Gaza as the temporary truce expired. Instead of demanding a permanent ceasefire, this week Congress passed a series of resolutions that dehumanize and erase Palestinians.
**This refusal to view Palestinians as equal human beings is fueling anti-Palestinian racism, inciting violence in occupied Palestine and in the United States.**
These resolutions also endanger people who criticize the government of Israel. This includes Jewish Americans, Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and peace and anti war advocates, who are experiencing a rise in hate crimes, censorship, and repression.

Near where three Palestinian college students were shot for wearing keffiyehs and speaking Arabic, the University of Vermont banned Palestinian author Mohammed el-Kurd from speaking on campus. This repression is happening around the country.
Hisham, one of the students who was shot, may now be partially paralyzed for the rest of his life. His mother Elizabeth thought her son would be safer in the U.S. than at home in the West Bank, but this is a dangerous time to be Palestinian anywhere.
Many Palestinians are also experiencing regular humiliation and degradation.
This past week, a young man who I have known most of his life informed me that on his American Airlines flight, he was instructed by a flight attendant to remove his sweater that said Palestine on it. He was devastated and felt like the erasure of Palestinians in our country has no limits.
[**Please add your name now to demand our federal government recognize Palestinians’ humanity and rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKus1MLbJ72C3fd7DC309oWU3KjLNq9ipZ64DA8jyPAXRS-BSKHvRLoAe4m3UCZQxzN5hrpAhixspYgWAqBMhlDsrxcX88G-QTUUxCFdFGg3Hi1nuU6RsK6ltGkx95ArZ6Jph3QnusRMaJSJm-c5PM4RX8D15e6uo2d_TMdfnbSQUzQFA0p74W4TRfKN3YVqdqvEbMxy-TO3h4y-0sSbs0yiVP_msVerGPcced-Jbpmp9Yym3_0zf7LSyrGC_V065rd2QCkgCYW6sGLhkDwUI1mLQrLkvV5_H5Y5KN1DiRWSUQEMeYHoc_1u9JiHmIcDI1muotnOu5Mn-_b0FVCNSZ3kZSJYXPwfGh01oxXZGifAjMGya3kk2G7X2Ke2EC8mcvi2FxwGglwYg3-rGTaD0iStD9Tn2yU7W35OTaHmK4ZZ76VSAvV-HOZYElZBrPBOoTbM0ejzkgE9o3ll_VgSErEj7fJnRfUSGd6wbz1WLvNd_ERYaAQyqSyEq6FcO2h6upz/41t/j6q9kdHyTtWreYo7IFXLpQ/h5/ts5oqiIG6kx3MeW6lHTXkir3kaccj2Yhe7s74DPZXgo)
I’m urging my colleagues in Congress to recognize that Palestinians have a right to coexist with Israelis in their historic homeland, with equal rights and freedom—rather than living under racial segregation or being subjected under Israeli apartheid to a military judicial system, separate from Israelis’ civilian legal system.
Right now, thousands of Palestinians are held by Israeli forces without charge, trial, or access to an attorney. Those who are charged with a crime face a near-100% conviction rate, under an unjust and racist system.
**I will continue to push for a permanent ceasefire, the release of all hostages, and the release of innocent Palestinian civilians who are arbitrarily detained.** Israel’s government continues to violate international law, including by carrying out illegal occupation and apartheid—which will never lead to a just and lasting peace.
My colleagues’ failure to call for the release of arbitrarily detained Palestinians demonstrates their refusal to view Palestinians as equal human beings who deserve the same rights as Israelis.
I will continue to advocate for human rights for all people, because everyone deserves to live free from violence and free from racist and oppressive policies.
[**Add your name if you agree: As Congress attempts to rewrite history and ignore the existence of the Palestinian people, we must speak out and affirm that: Palestinians exist. We are human beings. clean_body: This week, Congress passed resolutions that dehumanize Palestinians, contributing to violence and erasure. | | | Friend, Arab Americans and Muslim Americans have been feeling betrayed by our government. This past week, Israel began bombing Gaza again after the temporary truce expired. Instead of demanding a permanent ceasefire, Congress passed multiple resolutions that continue to devalue Palestinians and support Israel’s government while it commits genocide with U.S. tax dollars and American-made weapons. The dehumanizing rhetoric from the media and government leaders is fueling anti-Palestinian hate crimes and endangering Muslims and Arabs around the world, including in the United States. We must speak out not only against the violence, but also to recognize Palestinians’ humanity. Thankfully, our movement demanding a ceasefire is growing. On Friday, the United Auto Workers Union became the largest union in the U.S. to join our calls for a ceasefire, joining the American Postal Workers Union, which combined represent 600,000 workers across the country. | Too many of my colleagues in Congress refuse to view Palestinians as equal human beings who deserve the same rights, freedom, and human dignity as Israelis. They refuse to call for a permanent ceasefire, or for the release of Palestinian civilians being held by Israeli forces without charge or trial. I keep wondering: How many more lives will be enough? How many more children need to be killed? How many more families have to be traumatized and torn apart, before our government’s leaders call for a permanent ceasefire? Thank you for calling for a true ceasefire, and for recognizing that Palestinians are not disposable. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Dec 1, 2023 Subject: Add your name to affirm that Palestinians exist. We are human beings. And we will not be erased. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Israel’s military has resumed its bombing of Gaza as the temporary truce expired. Instead of demanding a permanent ceasefire, this week Congress passed a series of resolutions that dehumanize and erase Palestinians. This refusal to view Palestinians as equal human beings is fueling anti-Palestinian racism, inciting violence in occupied Palestine and in the United States. These resolutions also endanger people who criticize the government of Israel. This includes Jewish Americans, Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and peace and anti war advocates, who are experiencing a rise in hate crimes, censorship, and repression. Near where three Palestinian college students were shot for wearing keffiyehs and speaking Arabic, the University of Vermont banned Palestinian author Mohammed el-Kurd from speaking on campus. This repression is happening around the country. Hisham, one of the students who was shot, may now be partially paralyzed for the rest of his life. His mother Elizabeth thought her son would be safer in the U.S. than at home in the West Bank, but this is a dangerous time to be Palestinian anywhere. Many Palestinians are also experiencing regular humiliation and degradation. This past week, a young man who I have known most of his life informed me that on his American Airlines flight, he was instructed by a flight attendant to remove his sweater that said Palestine on it. He was devastated and felt like the erasure of Palestinians in our country has no limits. I’m urging my colleagues in Congress to recognize that Palestinians have a right to coexist with Israelis in their historic homeland, with equal rights and freedom—rather than living under racial segregation or being subjected under Israeli apartheid to a military judicial system, separate from Israelis’ civilian legal system. Right now, thousands of Palestinians are held by Israeli forces without charge, trial, or access to an attorney. Those who are charged with a crime face a near-100% conviction rate, under an unjust and racist system. I will continue to push for a permanent ceasefire, the release of all hostages, and the release of innocent Palestinian civilians who are arbitrarily detained. Israel’s government continues to violate international law, including by carrying out illegal occupation and apartheid—which will never lead to a just and lasting peace. My colleagues’ failure to call for the release of arbitrarily detained Palestinians demonstrates their refusal to view Palestinians as equal human beings who deserve the same rights as Israelis. I will continue to advocate for human rights for all people, because everyone deserves to live free from violence and free from racist and oppressive policies. Thank you for demanding a ceasefire and for valuing Palestinians’ lives. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

1️⃣ **_Georgia:_ Legislators meet to create new district maps ahead of a key election year **
In Georgia, a special legislative session began Wednesday to redraw the state's political maps after a federal judge ruled that the current district lines illegally dilute the power of Black voters. [Fairer maps would be a huge win for Democrats and voters statewide →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMjcsZYmsHdnh-y46G-BVTxTBRmo9HYswmhRCQd9kp4gPZkVD2EAR9FZ-m_aAcEqwAtyjnqH_D1DkWMpd0RD14wbS7WZ-YD8LaKkfy8zM3_oTBsJ6SkgEuhhfPd3Pa-EWd6yXAenuZeTSqE6XsvlckV5kHoFgauR8iNjClWNKKxed_9t9i8OaCkYo2KhjFFkCDA8drYoXT46v5FCGsRTO2y1ZcaQsrJkgF3_lmtnevT2iA6kkFE3DT-q690X5IdD4TZXkhrIF-EgPAZfs2gKftLkybZnvlJsZnjF-uCCZYl9KRAwEZN4W-d2x71lA8xyRGd8o40FXw-NB4DPPz_7421vYNogLnq7sz13Zc6VR0NXQVcUHOdF8lpOpYUfFETZc_WPKtr52PH4SL2_O3rwbTVayS8Rk47qiIymjEyh-ZT6qRfjjceDZOIU7qOLt-qyJuVzjl7SRVW3zEMYv_Z8iJ2wmJI7CzQo_eSrIik1wXKij09rh6ghMCl0x3plxmaDkW9xWYOMb_x9XcyzNcSJhWq17fcb0JSEWdzTyNZ8JQL3jllHwmgFzj31EKezR6GEvf7zb9G4SUrm39QmmpkIkfjNw8K5t9n55JmyZYDLsQ2ifRzd1US0aMotIfKMIdF3VE9FyqMvJFi8jj3QlHgYHsk/41t/hiVEHEeMSXK3EJOB1uTXmQ/h1/FrXYPetmg1JgRoNmI6AoWBgyvOCs3tMmejZRcOcw2Kk)

2️⃣ **_Arizona:_ Republicans to face charges for delaying election certification**
In Arizona, after their attempts to undermine democratic processes, two AZ Republicans are now facing charges of interfering with an election officer and conspiracy. [**This is a step toward GOP accountability for widespread election denialism →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDF_EhahDunAKtjeY1qEh5p9tiJ58-ugMa8TGB1sGx11raNlEf9IbZ3kcDhy_dH8oFQKPHwC9wgmg3yBPJHBhek6krXWSPShRuWqRZ_VCzPE-mpicoJFjIwSRv7cJtT0JbLAS3DtVZ4yESMcR91ByR-W8S1vXv-EXwhJPwasKTHqqJWvrs_6mpgJMitvhj-_p_3GWX7ZUSoNhQ3Dyn_S3IycnBQeRA3OLxAxU9znkmAIrEQJKUQBoALaEDKxty5md9eqlSHWMMqXPt66DMjo9EGzgbRG98plqyhxakJbyHflYIyKZAgr4enSsuDCdSmlqjwELWhZ-OaOEs4OCraBRIlcXa572F1VjFcMmiz_86e0Fs-MtHqmaLcJeuHEzvs8AbIlpn7em0umNBN3alWB3Ir2MEZ538JvQMre64IXzN4rs50zQGjhw2Gkbwl5iWw4owohEqoQ_6JKRJRGkZFQuTfjkvGnYndG4rFqHDyArrL3ItbNhzLkebymjAxiO7imuTiRCbYis9LcuS_zAPoyLhFQhctDBP-gjh3bvtY7s2a6DIQdRK1tak9JiHMLmlhISDjuaFLyZ7Yqvoicr8lDZcpql9p_vHbADhjo09v86o5dIXMTVBj_JaFCV3s3CXSY7mb3V2c0xN1cowNOR-6JGmEgLyRBRJEzSHW49jd_QYkcz/41t/hiVEHEeMSXK3EJOB1uTXmQ/h2/iCsza-rPf_xEFoDyCEcOVbWOY7so6nfs8vryVpeVZIE)
3️⃣ **_Ohio:_ State supreme court dismisses cases calling for fair redistricting **
In Ohio, after a years-long fight, the supreme court [**dismissed Democrats’ efforts to redraw the maps, and upheld the Republicans’ gerrymandered maps →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHzaCQKISagyl4zUdcJW7xmSfQ8QD1YTKSZeSGSSldozpUkrptyYjITfj4YP_r9I8S_XRvFI5aX6GF_WenYFbvgan51ThmBb3JLZF2gnotZLRc5iSXEB-4h1g4pLoFLk82ZFCQJ7a8p47oSUa0YwJTaVJ9nd7K2L8SN4Hzd_ma1zb6KkRSN38SIowg49UgL9xe86TcKF15AzJHK_o0h_bKbMpwvv-jBCsHIdGLoIGLW7A-HEXGAPgkUWlXn_GsUk55mzZ-zSGfbYEnm-c2Ivy2UOPxGQNqN9P8F2bU7yRIP0uGu8NWVBINm_znju87DQADCgK7ZXEyJ98cdHiU2ZBO2CdaLUdpfpHJRq4xsH4GrEgykScIVlqPYs75HmN9xpucTW7OFnY3Vu_M9HABBKM4Q5TfgQfueYTFViFTrtE6-kIzCW9c8zWf1LWe2xYEE7pJLZz640PcsUp7ym6uxKTl6paQOcJfAgI8SE9F8VBMBQhDdMDoRFeFexJrEhZ5BIpc9FdZ8Yx8SGbocaZ1Bv9l3NYAMRrLZ8KiZVEsxvqdvCCrT6H3Elkmg2U5mnMyls01yWy4n3n8bBrpazPof7YzzV7uRQhErgtIuMYiNUxUMCmzxh9neWX1145D4z5A1L7uTtTUPT8LH2N_cFU1dYCKUC/41t/hiVEHEeMSXK3EJOB1uTXmQ/h3/dhk8HZold589W6uV9CsCOOfGerhZzsp4KMBy3bIX1vI)
📖 **_Read:_ “Which states could get new congressional maps in 2024?” **
Redistricting challenges have become the new frontier of voting rights and equal access to the ballot. With courts finding that Republican-drawn maps are illegal for the ways in which they disenfranchise marginalized voters, calls to reconsider the maps have sprung up nationwide. [**Check out which states are fighting for fair maps here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdYCL4n6-HtNLvKsHk84248ME83zAJmUDHMOORqPABUiNmy_xuK8mu2QOOcVybioU1n5zBxwz3UHpmh0alt69VTW1dWIm7TlSd0bl1AmAoSV7slUVW-IUQKTAXkp5ZEbbF26V6y1JtQakQZgBOswHVWfds2WJmofcrU_oph-gvX37A6c_dBrlESTSOwjvQMeuLYKYe_0qkVNpLFsTWq6IukfmFO15Xjadx2vqLNoK4lCKApMnF6I42LmuD2p1RTBRzmfOI_iBdc7aWPQiZiwGlIV-OK_L85m-IiM4rprkQTS0Sn0lbOlN4AMA1PTQRcEADRS8yfSh9XDDifx_8Q0F6N-VrvorfBRUiqw5bA8M3PWHnkZhxjdmk7Yd66XufqUenGSU6HfAYU6FDZ0jdKUV_mwLeLvKwDIGos-gwzXbQvV41ljVhtgXMUGONQ5VTDdC_cPVcy8KN33_BNe-1yl-PwfKSp_Ae7hfCQMKJUhb7i5IAQrKlTjTHxLEfZIQxFIicFgeLqlie6uifUhsiB1zG7lI6UdCfiZI-mkTVRDwl_CsyU3tcn78zNqID13uVYuXoySw7X8SlHbeU-TKk6xWILP6xmUx1lvBNDQQs4PYvzsmSnvxz9FRK6HnkJ819AAVtOmEPYkPhlZ5Bi_6vmJlpc/41t/hiVEHEeMSXK3EJOB1uTXmQ/h4/b9JRC2cyf3_kxkgG2_34kCeU8g0E1deMKgeXC2AHD18)

We have just under a year until Election Day, friend. **But truthfully, today, I'm not thinking about that — I'm thinking about the day _after_ Election Day.**
I'm thinking about whether we're going to wake up the day after Election Day full of pride and hope for our country — or if we're going to wake up with a sinking pit in our stomach, full of regret that we didn't do more. That we didn't tell more of our friends to vote. That we didn't chip in more to make sure that Debbie had enough resources to fight back against Rick Scott's massive fortune.
Because, friend, last time Rick Scott ran for Senate, Democrats like me woke up the morning after Election Day full of regret. **He won that race by just 10,033 votes — that's only 0.12%. And he outspent our candidate by $50 MILLION. **
**Five years ago, we let Rick Scott buy a Senate seat. There's no way I'm letting that happen again next year — _especially with our Senate majority on the line in Florida._**
The good news is that Debbie has _almost_ everything she needs to win: She's an incredible, proven candidate with a unique ability to connect with voters all across her state. **She understands the issues that Floridians care about because she's lived them.** And polling data shows that she's already made this race a statistical tie.
**The bad news is that she doesn't yet have the resources that she'll need to compete with Rick Scott's fortune. Building that kind of war chest starts right now:[That's why I'm personally asking you to rush a donation before midnight tonight to help Debbie flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority. Please, we don't want to wake up in November with _any_ regrets.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74516250/441815966/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk382-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjA1Yjg3NmQtMWI5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Aj1rjIqOQXMqfLm2R2yCnSKE-4QZutxPncCcD30cjbE=)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Save bees from toxic neonic pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Bees are on the BRINK, and toxic neonics are pushing them closer to EXTINCTION every second that passes.[_Take action to help SAVE BEES NOW! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170368?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Friend, bees are essential pollinators that play a crucial role in our planet’s ecosystems, including providing us with **70% of the world’s most nutritious crops.** That massive number can be hard to conceptualize on a global scale, so think of it this way:
* Bees are responsible for 1 in every 3 bites of food that we eat.
* Without bees, we would have significantly fewer fruits, vegetables, and nuts readily available to us.
* Less of these crops also means higher grocery prices, worsening the food security gap for those already facing socioeconomic barriers to access to healthy foods.

_**To put it simply — if essential pollinators like bees were to vanish, it would have tangible and devastating consequences to the world’s entire food supply.** _ But despite the pleas and scientific data from environmental experts, greedy Big Ag and pesticide companies continue to market consumer products containing _toxic pesticides called neonics_ , believed to be a primary driver for the recent **drastic decline in bee populations.** If we’re going to STOP this mass pollinator die-out and prevent an _**INSECT APOCALYPSE,**_ we urgently need the Environmental Protection Agency to step up and **__prioritize people, the planet, and our pollinators above pesticide profits.__** But it’s going to take A LOT of public pressure to persuade the EPA — so we’re calling on **4,591 more grassroots activists** like you to raise your voice by signing our petition by **TONIGHT’S 11:59 P.M. DEADLINE.** [**_Can we count on your signature right now to help protect bees from being WIPED OUT by toxic neonics?_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170369?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170370?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics are the most widely-used pesticides in the entire world. They are not only **_FATAL to bees_** but have also been linked to _**serious health risks in humans**_ — including heart and brain malformations, memory loss, tremors, and even cancer!
Pesticide industry giants like Bayer-Monsanto have spent big money on strategic campaigns to **deceive the public** and downplay the **DANGERS of neonics.** But the science is out, Friend, and consumers like you know see right through _Big Ag’s deceptive and dangerous lies._
The EU has already banned the worst neonics, but here in the states, the EPA has yet to take action. In fact, the agency might actually even _**APPROVE**_ these harmful pesticides _**for another 15 years!**_ _**For the sake of people, our planet, and pollinators, we cannot let that happen, Friend.**_ [_**Your advocacy is truly critical to our environmental goals, and we just can’t make a big enough impact without you. So please, Friend, will you take immediate action now to demand that the EPA bans toxic neonics before it’s too late?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170371?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2170370?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for raising your voice to protect our planet from harmful pesticides,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D275981&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

body:
it was a new state record.
| Team, In 2020, Donald Trump won more votes in the presidential election than any other candidate in Ohio’s history. Fast forward to today, where Democrats in the Senate are holding on to the majority by a razor-thin margin and one of two senators who could decide Senate control in 2024 – our very own Sherrod Brown – is up for reelection. There’s no doubt that this is cause for concern. Our Senate majority is on the line. But after this past year, we believe the tides are changing. We turned out voters in historic numbers in the August special election while Republican leaders were actively trying to silence our voices. And we overwhelmingly voted to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution. Now we need your help to prove that Ohio is turning blue. ****[Donate today to help us elect Democrats statewide to Congress next year so we can show the naysayers that Ohioans are resoundingly ready to flip Ohio blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74516484/441816694/-1650906831?refcode=odp_em_231203_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhjNjFlZC0xZTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wL0oNgh0MY_rOtsTemB9mXkDhVM6uOlQpBwlayOPwU4=)**** Thank you, Team Ohio Dems ** ** | ****Control of the House and Senate in 2024 runs right through Ohio. subject: I surprised some supporters with a thank you call

body:

Derek, a few weeks ago we emailed saying I’d be randomly calling some of the folks who chipped in that day. Getting to talk with supporters is one of my favorite things, and these calls always inspire me—even on the tough days! I wish I could call every single one of you, but because I can’t, **[I hope you’ll enjoy this compilation my team put together of some of my calls:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231203-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_CAL_20231203_V1_F&refcode2=34160_3422442_3rPJES&akid=34160%2E3422442%2E3rPJES)**

Thanks for being a part of our campaign,
Katie

This is huge, team.
The Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – has __upgraded__ our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert.
**Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!”**
[**If you’re all-in to help me send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024, then please, chip in $5 or more to my campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74516882/441818257/1610638071?refcode=em20231203pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ef5ea1ea-2092-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjVlYTFlYS0yMDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9bBbD56or7CSCwdkwGghVxd34pdq9ov_RQeoLTETxU=)
This is going to be a tough race. I’m running in a district that leans Republican by 8 or 9 percentage points.
But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another extremely close race: 50% to 48%.
A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend _even more_ this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district.
I’ve already clocked over 40,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. **But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn. Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and finally stop the angertainment circus in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74516883/441818258/1610638071?refcode=em20231203pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ef5ea1ea-2092-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjVlYTFlYS0yMDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9bBbD56or7CSCwdkwGghVxd34pdq9ov_RQeoLTETxU=)

clean_body: This is huge. This is huge, team. The Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – has upgraded our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert. Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!” = This is going to be a tough race. I’m running in a district that leans Republican by 8 or 9 percentage points. But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another extremely close race: 50% to 48%. A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend even more this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district. I’ve already clocked over 40,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support is what has gotten us this far. We cannot let up now. Thank you so much for everything. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Inslee insider exposed real corruption
body:
We hope you enjoyed the final Pac-12 football championship game
with your friends and family, and can now look forward to the
University of Washington representing our state in the Sugar Bowl
on New Year's Day (if you're into that kind of thing).

Friends,

We hope you enjoyed the final
Pac-12 football championship game with your friends and family,
and can now look forward to the University of Washington
representing our state in the Sugar Bowl on New Year's Day (if
you're into that kind of thing). Now the holidays are truly going
full steam. And, as always, we hope to keep you up-to-date with
an item or two of interest this week from your own backyard. Read
on…

This week's Newsmaker
Interview…
Shift's Newsmaker Interview
featured Jennifer Sey, former Levi Strauss & Co. executive and
author of "Levi's Unbuttoned: The Woke Mob Took My Job but Gave
Me My Voice." Sey, a speaker at the 2024 Roanoke Conference,
discussed her concerns about the impact of distance learning on
students' education and social development. In the interview, she
shared her experiences from the COVID pandemic, including her
fight against activists attempting to silence her concerns and
the challenges she faced within Levi's when advocating for
reopening public schools. Sey also previewed her upcoming
documentary, "GENERATION COVID," which explores the long-term
effects of COVID lockdowns on children. Read more.

This week's top story…
Given the numerous instances of
scandal within Washington state government that Shift has covered
throughout Governor Jay Inslee's almost 11-year tenure, it was
only a matter of time before an insider exposed real corruption.
Our Friday Daily Briefing focused on investigative reporter
Susannah Frame's revelations, despite objections from the
governor's office to withhold information until they have covered
up what they need to. The Inslee administration's clumsy attempt
to halt KING 5's reporting on the true cost of the Jay Inslee's
carbon tax has backfired, as a former state economist has filed a
legal claim alleging retaliation for refusing to conceal the
tax's true impact. The 35-year employee claims his career was
ruined for refusing to lie about the new state policy, after he
did the "6th grade math" showing it would increase pump prices by
45 to 50 cents per gallon in early 2023 - as turned out to be the
case, much the chagrin of Democrats trying to cover that up. Read
this story and more.

In case you missed it…
This week, Shift alerted our
readers to leaked court documents revealing secret negotiations
between the Biden Administration, Washington state, and extreme
environmental groups to dismantle the four Lower Snake River
dams, raising concerns about Eastern Washington's economy. A
Seattle Times report provided detailed information, including a
proposal for a Pacific Northwest Tribal Energy Program to replace
dam services with "clean, renewable socially-just energy
resources." Absent from the negotiations were considerations of
"reliability" and "affordability," suggesting a prioritization of
Gov. Inslee and the Democrats' pursuit of "socially-just energy"
at the potential expense of taxpayer dollars and higher consumer
prices. Read this story and more.

Your bit of inspiration for the
week…

Take a moment to enjoy the
Pacific Northwest in the winter, captured by former U.S. Rep. Rod
Chandler.

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: I’ve joined the Kennedy campaign to get him on the ballot in all 50 states
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Glimpses of each week on the road to the White House

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=1)
---
* * *
# Notes from the Campaign Trail
Edition #2 from Randy Economy

* * *
* * *
Dear Peter, **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is surging in the polls** , but that won’t matter unless we get the million+ signatures needed to get him on the ballot. My name is Randy Economy, and I’ve joined the campaign to make sure his name is in every voting booth in the nation.
I know it’s possible because I led the RecallGavin2020 campaign where we gathered some 2 million signatures. No one thought we could do it, but we proved them wrong. We relied on a mostly volunteer army of people who believed in democracy. And now we’re going to do that again. I have loved the bold and brilliant political work of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for decades. And now the moment has come to make him President. Only one president was elected without a national political party— George Washington. That’s why it is no exaggeration to say, **we are going to make history!**
By stepping outside party politics, we are going to make RFK Jr.’s words come true:
**“We cannot allow our country to be as divided as we are today. We must heal the divide.** I would like to thank Mr. Kennedy and Campaign Manager Amaryllis Fox Kennedy for giving me the opportunity to allow Americans to freely choose who will be their next president. We will break the hammerlock of the two parties and all the corrupt forces behind them.
I'd also like to thank my mother Rosemary Economy for tutoring me in American democracy. Her example of tireless work to elect remarkable people to public office has shaped my life and my love for RFK Jr. Finally, I’d like to ask all of you to **help put some muscle behind this effort and**[**donate to the campaign**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=2)**.** When you see the name Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. on the ballot, you will know that your gift has made a difference. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=3 "$25") [$25](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=3)
---

---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=250&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=6 "$250") [$250](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=250&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=randy_economy_campaign_trail_3&n=6)

body:
| We need to start taking David Clarke’s potential candidacy seriously.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1641%2E35263%2E2QaKp1)
Peter — It’s no secret that former Milwaukee Sheriff David Clarke wants to run for Senate to defeat Tammy Baldwin. But his latest slip is the closest we’ve seen to an “announcement.” He was introduced as **"Senate Candidate Sheriff David Clarke"** on a recent right-wing Newsmax broadcast. Which begs the question: _Do they know something we don’t?!_ Even if we chalk this up to a Freudian slip, it’s clear that **we need to start taking David Clarke’s potential candidacy seriously.** Clarke is a far-right extremist who praises violent organizations like the Proud Boys, calls the deadly January 6 insurrection a “frat party gone wild,” and is one of Donald Trump’s loudest cheerleaders. **[David Clarke has his sights set on defeating Tammy and flipping Wisconsin red. We need your help to keep him far away from the U.S. Senate, so please rush in a donation now to help Tammy fend off far-right extremists like him:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231203_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1641%2E35263%2E2QaKp1)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231203_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1641%2E35263%2E2QaKp1)

name: BobCasey.com
subject: Donald Trump just promised to repeal the ACA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
The fate of millions of Americans' access to health care is on the line.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0)
This is important, Peter.
Donald Trump promised to repeal the Affordable Care Act if Republicans take control in 2024.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0)
**[Chip in any amount right now to help us fight back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?refcode=em20231203-2&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0)**
That makes this race here in Pennsylvania all the more important. If Bob Casey loses, he'll be replaced by Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate who would be a yes vote to terminate the ACA in the Senate.
**Bob Casey believes every Pennsylvanian deserves access to quality and affordable health care. Full stop.**
And he has the record to prove it: In the Senate, he's working to lower out-of-pocket health care costs, protect Medicare and Medicaid, and expand access to health care for all.
But right now, Bob is facing his toughest re-election fight yet. Mitch McConnell knows that if he flips PA red, he will likely flip the Senate, and he's prepared to spend whatever it takes to do just that.
**[With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we need your help to fight back. Will you rush an urgent donation today to re-elect Bob and protect millions of Americans' access to health care?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?refcode=em20231203-2&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0)**
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?amount=15&refcode=em20231203-2-el&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?amount=25&refcode=em20231203-2-el&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?amount=50&refcode=em20231203-2-el&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?amount=100&refcode=em20231203-2-el&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?amount=250&refcode=em20231203-2-el&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231203-2?refcode=em20231203-2&refcode2=1283_552475_vffdH0&akid=1283%2E552475%2EvffdH0)

clean_body: The fate of millions of Americans' access to health care is on the line. This is important, Peter. Donald Trump promised to repeal the Affordable Care Act if Republicans take control in 2024. That makes this race here in Pennsylvania all the more important. If Bob Casey loses, he'll be replaced by Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate who would be a yes vote to terminate the ACA in the Senate. Bob Casey believes every Pennsylvanian deserves access to quality and affordable health care. Full stop. And he has the record to prove it: In the Senate, he's working to lower out-of-pocket health care costs, protect Medicare and Medicaid, and expand access to health care for all. But right now, Bob is facing his toughest re-election fight yet. Mitch McConnell knows that if he flips PA red, he will likely flip the Senate, and he's prepared to spend whatever it takes to do just that. We're counting on your support. — Team Casey To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you.
