Peter,

I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc77e977256a43afa460bea6a669af5c&_e=-10PqCJVzYVjt7qKD809lWwnXEVP1IR_-reMccI2kVXueogocWkbeOjjCY3h_IRodX5zHvbJP00VBVagIj858gUcd2gqxju1N-r42qsCsx6zlppFy_r3o3_DOoje89DrhHFV-k8epJf5mwVXCQXT7mOf4Sq6DTatbgD6OFgqoBq5mCKLkG0zXXUuizIuoMkA_t-Ct7XO7JApGyfkOwsQIfrj5guyiY3w1mCFExU9Dxm9vHwKLjXU9fgy5V8RZtkmg0G71VkoAz-V8_QlMO-0SraY_nJRxEWlEylV1qUCqE0ngBiolDmJwtdeI8LdxUw-JOM2aRE18d6_cTM3-1G_F_HLaDpPxbCf_G1u9S9vH164lQOOu9BpkR2-R6KQ67PR4ALQqOtkI_5t80NVTgpf9g%3D%3D)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc77e977256a43afa460bea6a669af5c&_e=-10PqCJVzYVjt7qKD809lWwnXEVP1IR_-reMccI2kVXueogocWkbeOjjCY3h_IRodX5zHvbJP00VBVagIj858gUcd2gqxju1N-r42qsCsx6zlppFy_r3o3_DOoje89DrhHFV-k8epJf5mwVXCQXT7mOf4Sq6DTatbgD6OFgqoBq5mCKLkG0zXXUuizIuoMkA_t-Ct7XO7JApGyfkOwsQIfrj5guyiY3w1mCFExU9Dxm6X4L6EPvL96NohYw0m5KmGyIKpBHvFfJS_egYZHawUxd0-9ZO8aMqA1y3du_0C1Mf_MrueNoevfI2Ttns9ELVKPnQ3S6y943OwXRLt9cTV1ri98_jI9NxZmJeaz2XKaVO31h4Xw59BVHOnLpmP8HAl3xSCBbOltOteVutEJ0lYQ%3D%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc77e977256a43afa460bea6a669af5c&_e=-10PqCJVzYVjt7qKD809lWwnXEVP1IR_-reMccI2kVXueogocWkbeOjjCY3h_IRodX5zHvbJP00VBVagIj858gUcd2gqxju1N-r42qsCsx6zlppFy_r3o3_DOoje89DrhHFV-k8epJf5mwVXCQXT7mOf4Sq6DTatbgD6OFgqoBq5mCKLkG0zXXUuizIuoMkA_t-Ct7XO7JApGyfkOwsQIfrj5guyiY3w1mCFExU9DxlxZo5LA6Vrl16lzC16tRfhxsX2TyGyO8SUxzAfgbekiuFJta4po-OrKVgP4UV_OWFxR9EnsEXPsXpzp9zUlm6qCZdhJ1Kwv3SIre603ITErQZTEqzqixU1kalF70o317kF8BAYEfXw0RKwhUzAUpGKplPOF8ubF6BwFrgBs-LDsg%3D%3D)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc77e977256a43afa460bea6a669af5c&_e=-10PqCJVzYVjt7qKD809lWwnXEVP1IR_-reMccI2kVXueogocWkbeOjjCY3h_IRodX5zHvbJP00VBVagIj858gUcd2gqxju1N-r42qsCsx6zlppFy_r3o3_DOoje89DrhHFV-k8epJf5mwVXCQXT7mOf4Sq6DTatbgD6OFgqoBq5mCKLkG0zXXUuizIuoMkA_t-Ct7XO7JApGyfkOwsQIfrj5guyiY3w1mCFExU9DxkHooVAZDsV6HAxrv0-RqmKl-Iv4bqoQ0vCeJpuBmBPfxwc33m-RJxTTBexw39NjJ_uwHhk-fetucTdGd5Z4chZtNxveQH9PWcNaFiHSdTnEqIBtzMXQdFco1-ieCGX69QJH-jovGQPv40gNbMCd4TIsxnr50PlkGX4S7DxqwF-3Q%3D%3D)

body:
No one does what we do, Peter. But we need you now. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74517440/441820291/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1371-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwZDc4NzAyLTI4OTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xBOx_G0VuAuZXwALK9Rkv20uY_tVGGfo_cFP1uISJWk=)
---
Peter – we said it in 2021. We said it in 2022. And we’re going to say it again now: Candidate quality matters. That means **winning against the far-right depends on running the right candidates in the right races at the right time.** And that’s exactly what Emerge does best.****
Emerge dedicates our efforts to recruiting and training bold Democratic women who know their communities deeply, and can bring out the best in all their neighbors – not sow chaos and division like the GOP. Our program alums are willing to put people first and fight for real policies and change, and that’s why Democrats are counting on Emerge women in the critical 2024 races. **So I’m asking now, while there’s still time to prepare for the fight ahead:**

| | **"Trump says he will renew efforts to replace 'Obamacare' if he wins a second term"**

\- _AP_

Peter,

Donald Trump and top Republicans are openly campaigning on a promise to dismantle the Affordable Care Act (ACA). If they get their way, healthcare access for MILLIONS of Americans will be in danger. We can’t afford to let this happen.

The stakes couldn't be higher. If Republicans hold the House and retake the Senate and White House, millions of Americans could lose their health insurance. This will put seniors and families across the country at risk of exorbitant healthcare costs just to stay healthy. **This is the future Republicans are fighting for next November.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Join Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna & Prof. Richard Wolff for a LIVE Economic Justice Town Hall tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231203_INV_econjusticetownhallRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_econjusticetownhall&t=1011&akid=4960%2E5885482%2Ewxhxcx

RSVP HERE! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231203_INV_econjusticetownhallRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_econjusticetownhall&t=1012&akid=4960%2E5885482%2Ewxhxcx)

Peter Willis, you’re invited!

This Monday, Our Revolution will host our LIVE Town Hall on Economic Justice with Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna, joined by Professor Richard Wolff and worker activists from around the country!

We will discuss issues that cut to the core of economic struggle in America including jobs — wages, housing, labor power, medical and student debt, and how soaring wealth inequality affects democracy.

RSVP now and we’ll send you a Zoom link to be part of the conversation Monday night with Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, Richard Wolff and more! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231203_INV_econjusticetownhallRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_econjusticetownhall&t=1013&akid=4960%2E5885482%2Ewxhxcx)

We’ll also hear from Barbara Lee about her run for U.S. Senate and teaming up with Bernie Sanders to introduce the Oligarch Act to tax billionaires.

The virtual event will kick off at 5:30 pm Pacific / 8:30 pm Eastern, and we don’t want you to miss it. Let’s organize together for a government and economy that works for all of us.

Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in to the exciting live event on Monday — and share it with your friends! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231203_INV_econjusticetownhallRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_econjusticetownhall&t=1014&akid=4960%2E5885482%2Ewxhxcx)

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Three things that Washington desperately needs| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZd3_HKhgW-kGhQ-iVJe0mMQqr-QEhEtnOjCmFo_gEl69lL8a3KG_RPWY2LSNajOKyB_0QpDW-_kpXtxcdh5PxPUBFXjAD1_-DOdIPVf_rbLoBCmn2bVJdhopyFdFiFwDc0BVRzgJR4QZdMuWjp9wdbA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, **Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity. ** **_These are the values at the core of who I am._** This is former FBI Special Agent Mike Rogers, and those three words are more than just the motto of the agency I used to work for. **[They’re words that have guided my entire public service career.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZwZWKD7QKvRmlkbe6FZxtU4FePW0eYhiSxDBmf1jd3cDsAn2NUa9kxcXKD9Hqy75XzpBbyqqIo5PT7MkAKSG1zaLFhAHhijD9zz_EXl_AnDsUp3oM38C3amrZ_Ky02E8jmBRCaYnJqddN8pfXq9JCMQ%3D%3D)** **[Fidelity:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZEqZPoXpOvYfIYhKBH8pdtjdETuSBcn1YVUSxk_u4bMziF7ELN78v5Rj6hO6wyQJPiE6fKoDBFKB8ZECOsB9L9-z94z27kI6kmQh-9lVpQY_l9Qh1HR7eaQ981Zifh8OO1UtL15D6CYQZrZxaqg9kYQ%3D%3D)** I served my country in the U.S. Army and in the FBI, taking down some of America’s worst gangsters. I’ll always honor our American flag, our military, and all of the patriots who have served and sacrificed for our country. **[Bravery:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZtiO5P4DfbyYiNkkT7HhH_ikgHqJMvyJdOGFnPYi-78jruePSMWEirjs5tGmpxXsWCDk8pXksmBjge-u3ZDuDi8xuYwIvvB3bdu-fbN4SWT1mfsHr64930v-a8xIBG4czUACznLCscXlOgY9040-o5w%3D%3D)** I’ve always taken on the hard fights. From murderous mob bosses in Chicago to national security threats in Washington, I’ve never backed down or bent a knee to anyone threatening our safety or our country. **[Integrity:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZKlq_AXygLTbGHdhFWn6D3ZRltLhlVac1H79XyiN51-rOYVREd00LqWXFaDlfUejDk9fvhH_-khSAp0mQ8zHye17vIg9M_5-oTfo0hWIQ8-yppzZM30MeqsGUtSKUyvWwHBGoZPstgP1jBg8ZizPUoQ%3D%3D)** I pride myself on doing my work honestly and ethically. As a father and third-generation military veteran, I always taught my kids that being honest and true to who you are are two of the most important qualities a person can have. Friend, I’m running for the United States Senate in Michigan because Washington could use a lot more **_fidelity, bravery, and integrity_****.** As a conservative, I’ll use my experience as an FBI Special Agent and former Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee to take on government corruption, the border crisis, and the growing threat of the Chinese Communist Party. My home state of Michigan is also considered a **MUST WIN** if Republicans are to have any hope of taking back the Senate. Now that you know a little more about me, I’d be honored if you could **[contribute $5, $10, or even $25](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZtB8wxJ61ZL-WbYtDctXNgRBrgLf3VgKO7_YkJGUzUuiQDivmRR2MfOEgYTee1H9BH_yhoqWqezBq3adMyYcBO1KUhRuddkWRVGYu03U3OnqbMXUZpYBAuKVbQ40dnHvXW7hOkmgBerVwkZX8Xiltnw%3D%3D) **so that we can flip Michigan and get to work. Thanks for your support. Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=e15f5482ed2847a9a58947c48bbc5d37&_e=tw62ZpsIpaO_U7kM9fUwTOml2aiaNsVS40gCvtvWvn_MkkNZyTUQVcCJh6fMDveZT46XChxpy6JS0iEHHYpmATE79KaGso7XanUBu9Bb91rSAPxa1sgaBs6EmJ2USopVpLeGnp0-Fc6_yhGVhHBt3ORaN1x4wZGaVFtodPOdc16bYvNkHbj31gg8F3sALsaa49F_V2Me6uaqJ_PV_j1eCWC1iVFHs1zZYMSUHb4US1NeIKuvRgM72t7gzdFY16GZGVt3HU593kZDYPFfnVTqELyW9kfWjn3nClqr9maHcH7OKTIbq37vA2eI3bBxoVcNLl1T7fhPLcwgZWp4w3o6pD_-m5uQMeMyfcVIZxerqRazvs31h0RvheHHuDxya7EuICZBh8a8I_TXAHRwMXCuUw%3D%3D)
---
Mike Rogers

You were hand-selected as one of 500 top supporters to sign our card standing with House Democrats — **_yet your signature is nowhere to be found._** [**We’re giving you ONE last chance to sign or you’ll be moved to our NON-SUPPORTER list: Please add your name now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57738?t=6&akid=11954%2E878179%2Evy1RRW) | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57738?t=7&akid=11954%2E878179%2Evy1RRW)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The far-right Republican majority is a total DISASTER, even ousting their own Speaker and electing a new extremist.

Meanwhile, your caucus under Rep. Hakeem Jeffries’s leadership is unified and dedicated to saving abortion rights, voting rights, our democracy, and more.

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority next November!**

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57738?t=8&akid=11954%2E878179%2Evy1RRW) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57738?t=9&akid=11954%2E878179%2Evy1RRW)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My pre-existing condition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I wanted to take this opportunity to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for the U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74517725/441821253/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYxNmU5OC0yZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coClboAYJLUUXV_fgibOk5mYe00bfabkQ4wIo_g-bjw=&emci=930706fc-b88f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=46f16e98-2d92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)

| | Hi Derek, it’s Tammy Baldwin. I wanted to take this opportunity to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for the U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important. **When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital.** When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: "pre-existing condition." Derek, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Derek. __[**So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you split a donation between my reelection campaign and Senator Mark Warner’s to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74517726/441821254/-1850038335?refcode=mw_em_231203_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYxNmU5OC0yZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coClboAYJLUUXV_fgibOk5mYe00bfabkQ4wIo_g-bjw=)__ **[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74517731/441821259/-1850038335?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=mw_em_231203_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYxNmU5OC0yZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coClboAYJLUUXV_fgibOk5mYe00bfabkQ4wIo_g-bjw=)** **[DONATE OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74517732/441821260/-1850038335?express_lane_other=true&refcode=mw_em_231203_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYxNmU5OC0yZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coClboAYJLUUXV_fgibOk5mYe00bfabkQ4wIo_g-bjw=)** I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away. So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. __[**It starts by holding onto the Democratic Senate majority; chip in if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74517733/441821261/-1850038335?refcode=mw_em_231203_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYxNmU5OC0yZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=coClboAYJLUUXV_fgibOk5mYe00bfabkQ4wIo_g-bjw=)__ Thank you for standing with me, — Tammy ** **

Fellow American, _**the latest poll in the Washington gubernatorial race has Republican Dave Reichert LEADING Democrat Bob Ferguson by TWO POINTS!**_

****NEW NPI POLLING DATA:**
**REPUBLICAN DAVE REICHERT - 46%**
**DEMOCRAT BOB FERGUSON - 44%****

Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. We are extending the deadline until Midnight to ensure we reach this CRITICAL GOAL and HOLD the House Majority in 2024! If we want to Hold the House and stop Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Hakeem Jeffries, we cannot miss important Deadlines like this. These deadlines set the stage for 2024. Do you want to look back next year and wish you would have stepped up? | Thanks for your help! The Affordable Care Act provides coverage for over 40 million hard-working Americans who otherwise would not be able to afford insurance.

And it stops insurers from being able to deny coverage to the over 100 million Americans with a preexisting condition.
**As Joe Biden said when President Obama signed the ACA into law:**
**“This is a big f—ing deal.”**
And now, Donald Trump is promising to terminate it -- stripping health care protections from _nearly 1-in-3 Americans._
We can’t let that happen, Peter. **Grassroots Democrats like you are the reason the Affordable Care Act became law in the first place -- and now provides coverage for millions.**
[Rush a contribution of $25 or more to help show voters across the country their health care is at stake in 2024:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZnCojhadU-b1ix1YpHL0vbGADzeqRKxqJ41wJ6X41MfFjvJ2hooB6_414UfY2sddO8wM3bAdp3-Qc-Refpqj79L51ghEMW6yKPBBSNoBO4Yo9iAUW3fMMdQ3wbliDYNxwdg2oqFkkeH-vTbefnSXpkWmSnP987yXHbGmK474XtK4rY5Wy6fpbxwM7h73Tou44VJJtRdzp0Id07k-Kq9WbwyE0ZopqAvVNnPqm0meeQzoYFQHo0rsxXbpWZDCoipBz7trj-i3Apyz0qfEzNJ4xGJUT9pr-D_2q4xY3gl9v0MvtcDG_hlJoPV-3paYjaIlqE8Zhx3guTaTe-MKBefnMslMVExdzVYtR5I4j6sZDkFLxuOmh0K-UHZ3YtKbcElffurm2gG60tWmvhCv1lCHDVg/41t/lLUC52vaQDO2RPM5uqwXpA/h7/0Vbsa1iTEbXLJnoLBmua3B6wwn0jpq_i1Ucs8w5RU2Y)
